programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie take a disastrous journey to New Orleans, while Arthur tries to create a comic strip for Playboy, only to find his artistic talents leave something to be desired. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie and Doug yearn to play a golf foursome at the country club, and set about finding a date for Deacon to complete the group - even though it seems hes perfectly capable of managing his own love life. Starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Dougs uncle offers to finance his dream of owning his own sandwich shop. However, the scheme meets with disapproval from Carrie, who knows her husband isnt cut out for running a company, and from Danny, whose own request for help in starting a business was rejected

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra cannot understand why Ray keeps turning down her advances - not realising that playing it cool is all part of his latest devious plan to get what he wants. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Pat asks Robert to keep her cigarette habit a secret - but he later has to come up with an excuse when Amy smells smoke on him, leading to a string of revelations for the family

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the American comedy, Ray has a brush with death while undergoing minor surgery, but pulls through - leaving his family uncertain over whether to tell him what happened

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The new man in Rozs life befriends Frasier - who tries to keep the situation from her in case she starts to feel betrayed. Comedy, guest starring Gary Cole (Entourage), with Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Peri Gilpin

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Bubbly co-host Dr Mary joins Frasier to present a Christmas parade, but he is forced to take drastic action when she steals his limelight. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrink finds out he is going to receive a lifetime achievement award, but a letter of congratulations from his mentor plunges him into an emotional crisis. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by guests Tasha Ghouri, Vicky Pattison, Ellie Kildunne, Frances Barber and Kellie Shirley. With music from Arlo Parks

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is surprised to learn that his accountant neighbour Dan works for Fat Tony - and has been asked to take the Mob bosss place while he serves time on a jury. Meanwhile, Lisa decides to add insects to her diet, but is plagued by a series of nightmares. With the voice of Steve Carell

programme.title: Mr Poppers Penguins (2011)
programme.desc: A workaholic businessman always puts his job before his family until he receives an unexpected inheritance from his explorer father - six penguins. He abandons his plan to offload the birds to a zoo when he finds his kids love them, and sets about turning his New York apartment into a suitable habitat. Family comedy, starring Jim Carrey, Carla Gugino and Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Luca (2021)
programme.desc: Two sea monsters fascinated with life above water disguise themselves as human boys so they can explore a town on the Italian Riviera. The duo strike up a friendship with a local girl, and risk their secret being exposed as they help her to compete in an annual sporting event. Pixar animated adventure, with the voices of Jacob Tremblay and Jack Dylan Grazer

programme.title: Toy Story 3 (2010)
programme.desc: Woody, Buzz and the other toys accidentally end up in a daycare centre when their owner grows up. At first this seems like the perfect new home for them, but when they realise the dangers lurking under the surface, they begin to formulate an escape plan. Pixar animated adventure sequel, with the voices of Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Joan Cusack, Michael Keaton and Ned Beatty

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Hosts Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond and judges Cherish Finden and Paul Hollywood are joined in the tent by Alex Brooker, Ambika Mod, Rose Ayling-Ellis, Vicky Pattison and Sam Thompson. The celebrity bakers must make mini rolls and syrup sponge puddings, and recreate the most iconic outfits theyve ever worn in choux form

programme.title: Sarah Millican: Late Bloomer
programme.desc: The comedians seventh stand-up special, recorded during a performance at the Hexagon in Reading. Sarah reflects on how the timid child she used to be developed into the proudly outspoken woman she has become

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: The sixth hunt gets underway, and a first-time Predators ruthless pursuit is soon rewarded, even if its not the capture some were hoping for. Alliances chop and change, and the Predators join forces to hunt one unlucky player, who assumes their fate is sealed. But back at basecamp, a last-minute plot turns the game on its head

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Race Across the World, Married at First Sight Australia, The Apprentice, Last One Laughing, Secrets of the Bees, Just One Thing and Celebrity Ex on the Beach

programme.title: Speed (1994)
programme.desc: An LAPD cop discovers a psychotic criminal has planted a bomb on a crowded bus, primed to go off if the vehicle drops below 50mph. He boards the vehicle and helps a hapless passenger who has been forced to take the wheel and keep a constant speed to avoid a disaster. Action thriller, starring Keanu Reeves, Sandra Bullock, Dennis Hopper and Jeff Daniels

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Italian family restaurant Sabatiellos in Stamford, Connecticut, where the owners fiery temper upsets the staff and has left him more than $1million in debt. Gordons help is urgently needed to get customers back through the door, but the restaurateur does not take kindly to criticism and closes the restaurant down when his employees turn on him

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer must save his marriage after a disastrous lunch date at Swankyfish, and tries to prove to Marge just how much she means to him by helping around the house. Meanwhile, Milhouse acts like a bad boy to impress Lisa. Featuring the guest voices of Breaking Bads Bryan Cranston and Aaron Paul

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is down in the dumps, until Lisa wins him a hi-tech computer tablet in the school raffle - and it soon becomes impossible for him to put it down, as every waking minute he finds himself stroking or jabbing the shiny touchscreen. However, disaster strikes when he breaks the device, sending him spiralling back down into the depths of despair. But when Ned Flanders discovers the word Hope written on a tree trunk in the Simpsons garden, Homer believes it to be a miracle and his faith in life is restored - although newsman Kent Brockman isnt quite so convinced

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer chat to astronaut Tim Peake, in a highlight from Sunday Brunch

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Birmingham compete to win the £1,000 prize, including Helen and her husband Lorne, who aim to channel their 24 years together into a safe, solid menu. However, lovebirds Ciaran and Anita criticise the food for lacking passion, and try to spice things up. Meanwhile, Rob is so entranced by his Lithuanian wife Egle that he regularly feels the need to pinch himself whenever he looks at her

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect advises more people make their period homes fit for modern life. In Clapham, south London, Masum and Marias Victorian terraced home is no longer working for the three generations of family living there. George also travels to Hove to meet Louis and Sarah, who are tackling the upstairs of their 16th-century gatehouse

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Mike Bubbins joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Part two of two. A glamorous TV executive makes Sam an offer he cannot refuse, but Diane points out there are certain strings attached

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: As Sam and Diane finally get together, their bar-room pals grow increasingly pessimistic about the relationship. Comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cliff falls head over heels for Carlas not-so-innocent little sister, and it is up to the gang to tell him the truth about her. American bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra tires of having to deal with Rays interfering mother, grumpy father and resentful brother, who constantly show up out of the blue, and a white lie has embarrassing consequences. Pilot episode of the comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra sees newlywed friends making a public display of affection, and cannot help wondering why Raymond has so much trouble telling her he loves her. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray gives the eulogy at a family funeral, but his Aunt Alda spoils the solemnity of the event by rekindling a seven-year-old feud with his mother. American comedy, starring Ray Romano and Jean Stapleton

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrink takes his teenage son Frederick on a camping trip with Martin in a bid to rebuild their relationship. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: After relying on the American Automobile Association one time too many, Frasier and Niles take a car maintenance class, but soon find themselves in trouble when their lack of mechanical skill prompts them to act like unruly child. Meanwhile, Martin takes over the training when Roz gets Alice a puppy

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The brothers agree to produce a one-man show for a washed-up Shakespearean actor they idolised as children, but discover his talent has completely deserted him, and set out to save face with a spot of kidnapping. With guest stars Derek Jacobi and Patrick Macnee

programme.title: Annie (2014)
programme.desc: A businessman running for mayor of New York saves the life of an orphan, and invites her to live with him as a publicity stunt. The tycoons cynical nature is chipped away at by the youngsters sunny disposition. Meanwhile, her cruel foster mother hatches a kidnapping plot. Musical remake, starring Quvenzhane Wallis, Jamie Foxx, Cameron Diaz and Rose Byrne

programme.title: Womens FA Cup
programme.desc: Chelsea v Tottenham Hotspur (Kick-off 1.30pm). Jill Scott is joined by Maisie Adam to present live coverage of the quarter-final at Kingsmeadow. Chelsea will go into this tie as strong favourites, having won the last 13 Womens Super League matches between the sides and lifted this trophy last term, but Spurs are enjoying a good season so far and will be looking for an upset

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Levi Roots in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Craig Rowe helps Maria, who works in administration, and Paul, a retired police officer, who have been holidaying in southern Spain regularly to escape the English winters. Now, they want to find a property that feels like a home away from home among the countryside and traditional pueblos blancos of Andalusia

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Documentary following British families as they renovate French chateaux. At Château de la Boutinière, Alison and Zion race to restore a chapel thats lain untouched for 30 years in time for a couples 60th anniversary celebrations. At Château de Montespieu, newbies Louisa and Roger take on a bold revival of their towering six-turreted home

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: With so many delays to the renovation, Jasmine and Jon need an architect to advise them on what they can and cant do. Now that Jon is able to work on the build again, he attempts to fix the swimming pool - with mixed success. But even with everyone rolling up their sleeves, theyll need more help if theres any chance of being ready for their summer deadline

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.sub-title: Brilliant Builds: Storage Hacks and Smart Spends
programme.desc: Stoke couple Julie and Allen cannot agree on any of the houses they have viewed together, but they are also at a loss as to how they can make their current three-bedroom abode any better. In Newcastle, GP Kathleen and her anaesthetist husband Tom have a three-bedroom Victorian semi in disorganised chaos with Toms sporting gear taking root everywhere. Should they move on or reconfigure the downstairs?

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Puppies Poppy and Fizz struggle with kennel life and may need to be separated if they hope to find a new home. Moose the Staffy might be more than most families can handle

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 76-year-old man sustains a head injury after falling down some stairs, and his daughter reflects on how his caring for her mother through her dementia has left him exhausted. A five-year-old girl is brought into the paediatric department with a large splinter lodged in her bottom, and a patient has a lump on her shoulder that has developed since having a fall five weeks ago

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: The final five players embark on their most important hunt yet. With one player still reeling from losing their last remaining ally, rivalries are at an all-time high and the last two Predators are determined to guarantee their place in the final. But as the Prey desperately try to evade capture, a last-minute move threatens one players place in the contest

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Hosts Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond and judges Cherish Finden and Paul Hollywood are joined in the tent by Alex Brooker, Ambika Mod, Rose Ayling-Ellis, Vicky Pattison and Sam Thompson. The celebrity bakers must make mini rolls and syrup sponge puddings, and recreate the most iconic outfits theyve ever worn in choux form

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on the Eurovision Song Contest, Faking It, Virgin Island, The Four Seasons, Night Coppers, Inside Our Minds, Naked and Afraid, and Prue Leiths Cotswold Kitchen

programme.title: Britains Most Expensive Houses
programme.desc: Sothebys managing director Guy hopes to secure the listing of a £6.5million 14-bedroom, five-acre Grade II listed manor house mega home onto his books. Aston Tirrold in Oxfordshire boasts six reception rooms, a tennis court and a huge outdoor pool, and has been home to the same family since 1975. Broker Kenrick heads to Camden, north London, to try to secure the listing of an uber-modern glass building apartment with three bedrooms, three bathrooms and a 900-square-ft roof terrace

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of Anthony Trobiano, whose restaurant in Great Neck, New York, is failing even though his partners parents have given him their life savings and he has taken out half a million dollars in loans. Gordon has some harsh criticism about the unhygienic kitchen and the quality of the food being served, but the owner has trouble accepting his advice

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Britain is at war, and Emma frantically searches for a way to keep her businesses afloat. She has an ingenious plan, but its a huge gamble. Meanwhile, the men in Emmas life decide whether to sign up and risk their lives for their country. When a guilt-ridden Edwin enlists, Adam is willing to do anything to stop him, even prising open the past. In the 1970s, Paula and Emma are reunited as Paula rushes to warn her grandmother of a surprise twist in the coup against her

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: The war rages on. Emma is a widow and a single mother; business is failing and an unlikely alliance could be her only lifeline. In the 1970s, Emma returns home to Yorkshire for her 80th birthday party, armed with a cunning plan to outmanoeuvre her traitorous children, but another unseen betrayal is on the cards

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: A steam engine enthusiast embarks on an ambitious coast-to-coast journey across Devon, travelling across the countys rolling hills in an 80-year-old steamroller with a top speed of eight miles per hour. Farmers on Dartmoor rear a rare breed of sheep, while at Falmouth, a group of free divers explores a spectacular underwater cave

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Newmarket to find unexpected items in Margarets shed to make some cash for her local foodbank

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Warren struggles to trust his estranged brother Jenson. Diane makes a decision as her family struggle with her prognosis. A resident is forced to reveal the truth. And with things looking up, Donny proposes to Misbah, but its not long before their bubble bursts. Meanwhile, Cleo struggles to re-adjust to life at home. A relationship is on the rocks. Froggy supports his grandson. Donny visits a former flame. And a mother is horrified by what she overhears... Writers: Gareth Lemon, James Coleman, Colin ODonnell; Dirs: Kerri McLean, David Crowley; Prod Co: Lime PicturesShort: Warren struggles to trust Jenson. Diane makes a decision. Cleo struggles to re-adjust to life at home. And Donny proposes to Misbah, but its not long before their bubble bursts...

programme.desc: Homer is down in the dumps, until Lisa wins him a hi-tech computer tablet in the school raffle - and it soon becomes impossible for him to put it down, as every waking minute he finds himself stroking or jabbing the shiny touchscreen. However, disaster strikes when he breaks the device, sending him spiralling back down into the depths of despair. But when Ned Flanders discovers the word Hope written on a tree trunk in the Simpsons garden, Homer believes it to be a miracle and his faith in life is restored - although newsman Kent Brockman isnt quite so convinced

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer chat to astronaut Tim Peake, in a highlight from Sunday Brunch

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Birmingham compete to win the £1,000 prize, including Helen and her husband Lorne, who aim to channel their 24 years together into a safe, solid menu. However, lovebirds Ciaran and Anita criticise the food for lacking passion, and try to spice things up. Meanwhile, Rob is so entranced by his Lithuanian wife Egle that he regularly feels the need to pinch himself whenever he looks at her

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect advises more people make their period homes fit for modern life. In Clapham, south London, Masum and Marias Victorian terraced home is no longer working for the three generations of family living there. George also travels to Hove to meet Louis and Sarah, who are tackling the upstairs of their 16th-century gatehouse

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Mike Bubbins joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Part two of two. A glamorous TV executive makes Sam an offer he cannot refuse, but Diane points out there are certain strings attached

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: As Sam and Diane finally get together, their bar-room pals grow increasingly pessimistic about the relationship. Comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cliff falls head over heels for Carlas not-so-innocent little sister, and it is up to the gang to tell him the truth about her. American bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra tires of having to deal with Rays interfering mother, grumpy father and resentful brother, who constantly show up out of the blue, and a white lie has embarrassing consequences. Pilot episode of the comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra sees newlywed friends making a public display of affection, and cannot help wondering why Raymond has so much trouble telling her he loves her. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray gives the eulogy at a family funeral, but his Aunt Alda spoils the solemnity of the event by rekindling a seven-year-old feud with his mother. American comedy, starring Ray Romano and Jean Stapleton

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrink takes his teenage son Frederick on a camping trip with Martin in a bid to rebuild their relationship. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: After relying on the American Automobile Association one time too many, Frasier and Niles take a car maintenance class, but soon find themselves in trouble when their lack of mechanical skill prompts them to act like unruly child. Meanwhile, Martin takes over the training when Roz gets Alice a puppy

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The brothers agree to produce a one-man show for a washed-up Shakespearean actor they idolised as children, but discover his talent has completely deserted him, and set out to save face with a spot of kidnapping. With guest stars Derek Jacobi and Patrick Macnee

programme.title: Annie (2014)
programme.desc: A businessman running for mayor of New York saves the life of an orphan, and invites her to live with him as a publicity stunt. The tycoons cynical nature is chipped away at by the youngsters sunny disposition. Meanwhile, her cruel foster mother hatches a kidnapping plot. Musical remake, starring Quvenzhane Wallis, Jamie Foxx, Cameron Diaz and Rose Byrne

programme.title: Womens FA Cup
programme.desc: Chelsea v Tottenham Hotspur (Kick-off 1.30pm). Jill Scott is joined by Maisie Adam to present live coverage of the quarter-final at Kingsmeadow. Chelsea will go into this tie as strong favourites, having won the last 13 Womens Super League matches between the sides and lifted this trophy last term, but Spurs are enjoying a good season so far and will be looking for an upset

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Levi Roots in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Craig Rowe helps Maria, who works in administration, and Paul, a retired police officer, who have been holidaying in southern Spain regularly to escape the English winters. Now, they want to find a property that feels like a home away from home among the countryside and traditional pueblos blancos of Andalusia

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Documentary following British families as they renovate French chateaux. At Château de la Boutinière, Alison and Zion race to restore a chapel thats lain untouched for 30 years in time for a couples 60th anniversary celebrations. At Château de Montespieu, newbies Louisa and Roger take on a bold revival of their towering six-turreted home

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: With so many delays to the renovation, Jasmine and Jon need an architect to advise them on what they can and cant do. Now that Jon is able to work on the build again, he attempts to fix the swimming pool - with mixed success. But even with everyone rolling up their sleeves, theyll need more help if theres any chance of being ready for their summer deadline

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.sub-title: Brilliant Builds: Storage Hacks and Smart Spends
programme.desc: Stoke couple Julie and Allen cannot agree on any of the houses they have viewed together, but they are also at a loss as to how they can make their current three-bedroom abode any better. In Newcastle, GP Kathleen and her anaesthetist husband Tom have a three-bedroom Victorian semi in disorganised chaos with Toms sporting gear taking root everywhere. Should they move on or reconfigure the downstairs?

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Puppies Poppy and Fizz struggle with kennel life and may need to be separated if they hope to find a new home. Moose the Staffy might be more than most families can handle

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 76-year-old man sustains a head injury after falling down some stairs, and his daughter reflects on how his caring for her mother through her dementia has left him exhausted. A five-year-old girl is brought into the paediatric department with a large splinter lodged in her bottom, and a patient has a lump on her shoulder that has developed since having a fall five weeks ago

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: The final five players embark on their most important hunt yet. With one player still reeling from losing their last remaining ally, rivalries are at an all-time high and the last two Predators are determined to guarantee their place in the final. But as the Prey desperately try to evade capture, a last-minute move threatens one players place in the contest

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Hosts Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond and judges Cherish Finden and Paul Hollywood are joined in the tent by Alex Brooker, Ambika Mod, Rose Ayling-Ellis, Vicky Pattison and Sam Thompson. The celebrity bakers must make mini rolls and syrup sponge puddings, and recreate the most iconic outfits theyve ever worn in choux form

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Race Across the World, Married at First Sight Australia, The Apprentice, Last One Laughing, Secrets of the Bees, Just One Thing and Celebrity Ex on the Beach

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of Anthony Trobiano, whose restaurant in Great Neck, New York, is failing even though his partners parents have given him their life savings and he has taken out half a million dollars in loans. Gordon has some harsh criticism about the unhygienic kitchen and the quality of the food being served, but the owner has trouble accepting his advice

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Britain is at war, and Emma frantically searches for a way to keep her businesses afloat. She has an ingenious plan, but its a huge gamble. Meanwhile, the men in Emmas life decide whether to sign up and risk their lives for their country. When a guilt-ridden Edwin enlists, Adam is willing to do anything to stop him, even prising open the past. In the 1970s, Paula and Emma are reunited as Paula rushes to warn her grandmother of a surprise twist in the coup against her

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: The war rages on. Emma is a widow and a single mother; business is failing and an unlikely alliance could be her only lifeline. In the 1970s, Emma returns home to Yorkshire for her 80th birthday party, armed with a cunning plan to outmanoeuvre her traitorous children, but another unseen betrayal is on the cards

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: A steam engine enthusiast embarks on an ambitious coast-to-coast journey across Devon, travelling across the countys rolling hills in an 80-year-old steamroller with a top speed of eight miles per hour. Farmers on Dartmoor rear a rare breed of sheep, while at Falmouth, a group of free divers explores a spectacular underwater cave

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Newmarket to find unexpected items in Margarets shed to make some cash for her local foodbank

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Warren struggles to trust his estranged brother Jenson. Diane makes a decision as her family struggle with her prognosis. A resident is forced to reveal the truth. And with things looking up, Donny proposes to Misbah, but its not long before their bubble bursts. Meanwhile, Cleo struggles to re-adjust to life at home. A relationship is on the rocks. Froggy supports his grandson. Donny visits a former flame. And a mother is horrified by what she overhears... Writers: Gareth Lemon, James Coleman, Colin ODonnell; Dirs: Kerri McLean, David Crowley; Prod Co: Lime PicturesShort: Warren struggles to trust Jenson. Diane makes a decision. programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Rowan Atkinson leaves his brain at home once more to play the bungling buffoon of few words. He goes shopping for a new TV, has problems with an itchy foot and takes a lucky girl for a night on the town - leaving the usual trail of chaos in his wake

programme.title: Mr Bean

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Birth Mother
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler travel to Ohio to meet the mother of the baby they plan to adopt. The pregnant mother, Erica, likes them but only because their files got mixed up with a doctor and a female minister. Meanwhile, Joey is set up on a date with one of Phoebes friends, but soon regrets it when she tries to take some food off his plate, and Ross has a fashion faux pas when he accidently wears womens clothing on a date

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Gets Caught
programme.desc: Rachel and Phoebe see Chandler getting into a car with a mystery woman and follow them to a large house in the suburbs. They tell Monica of their fears and are shocked to hear the truth. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston, Lisa Kudrow and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where the Stripper Cries
programme.desc: Joey appears on quiz show The $100,000 Pyramid, but his disastrous efforts to answer the questions end up costing his partner the prize money. Meanwhile, the revellers at Phoebes hen party get a surprise once the stripper shows up. Guest starring Danny DeVito and Donny Osmond

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebes big day arrives, but wedding planner Monica and stand-in father of the bride Joey take their roles a little too seriously. To make matters worse, a blizzard hits New York and one of Mikes ushers is indisposed, forcing Ross and Chandler to step into the breach

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Speaks French
programme.desc: Joey persuades Phoebe to teach him French for an important audition, while Monica and Chandler show a pregnant Erica the sights of New York and learn more about the babys possible father. Guest starring Anna Faris and Ron Leibman

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel heads to a restaurant for a job interview, only to find herself sitting at a table within earshot of her current boss. Meanwhile, Monica and Chandler go house-hunting and Phoebe decides to change her name. Guest starring Paul Rudd and Dakota Fanning

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe learns Joeys agent has died, but he is so upset about his friends moving away that she decides not to tell him. Rachel worries about relocating to France, while Monica and Chandler are horrified to discover Janice is planning to buy the house next door to them. Guest starring Jane Lynch (Glee)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachels Going Away Party
programme.desc: The gang throws a going-away party for Rachel, but she prefers to say her goodbyes individually - and one of her friends is left feeling hurt at being overlooked. Meanwhile, Monica supervises the packing for a new life in the suburbs with Chandler, while also keeping a close eye on the mother of their future adopted child

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The Last One (Parts One and Two)
programme.desc: Double bill. The last-ever episode of the comedy sees the pals facing major changes. There is a surprise in store for Monica and Chandler when Erica finally gives birth to the child they are planning to adopt, Phoebe and Mike decide to start a family of their own and Rachel gets set to begin a new life in Paris. Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry and David Schwimmer star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: Pilot (The One Where Monica Gets a Room-mate)
programme.desc: The first-ever episode of the comedy, in which Rachel arrives at the local cafe after jilting her fiance at the altar. Chandler and Joey encourage Ross to enjoy bachelorhood when his lesbian wife walks out on him, while Phoebe supports herself playing guitar in the subway. Courteney Cox, Jennifer Aniston, David Schwimmer, Matthew Perry and Lisa Kudrow star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Sonogram at the End
programme.desc: Carol tells Ross she plans to raise his child with her lover Susan, but he can be involved if he wants. Ross and Monicas parents announce they are coming to dinner, while Rachel is aghast to discover her former fiance went on what would have been their honeymoon with her maid of honour

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica shows off her new boyfriend to the rest of the group, Chandler decides to take up smoking again and Phoebe makes a gruesome discovery that leads to her receiving a windfall. Starring Courteney Cox, Matthew Perry and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The girls end up breaking out binoculars in order to catch a glimpse of a good-looking neighbour with White House connections after accidentally receiving a pizza that he ordered, while Joey and Chandler take Ross to a ice hockey game to keep his mind busy

Featuring guest appearances by Elliott Gould and Christina Pickles

programme.title: Junior (1994)
programme.desc: A fertility expert pioneers a treatment enabling men to become pregnant and carry babies to full term. The situation is further complicated when he starts to fall for the woman whose child he is carrying. Comedy, with Arnold Schwarzenegger, Danny DeVito, Emma Thompson and Frank Langella

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Stoned Guy

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Two Parts - Part One

programme.title: Michael McIntyres The Wheel

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedian invites singer-songwriter and internet sensation Rick Astley to perform his new single at Londons Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. Also taking to the stage are rising Irish comedian Al Porter, and Olly Murs, who will surely be in safer territory singing to a live audience than he was in the first episode of this series, when Michael seized his mobile phone for Send To All, which this week features double gold medal-winning Olympic swimmer Rebecca Adlington. Plus, two very junior producers surprise their mother when they take over the show, and a trainee teacher receives the surprise of her life when she volunteers to help out at an art gallery, and ends up getting to live out her long-standing West End dream

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: Jack Whitehall joins Michael on stage at Londons Theatre Royal on Drury Lane, along with Sting, who performs some of his classic hits, and music from his new album 57th and 9th. Plus, Ricky Gervaiss insufferable middle-manager-turned-musician David Brent makes a special appearance. Celebrity chef Jamie Oliver risks the ire of his friends and family as Michael seizes his phone in Send to All, and two people from the same family receive the surprise of their lives in Unexpected Star

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The comedian returns with the third series of his family entertainment show, recorded in front of a live audience at Londons Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. He begins proceedings this time around with music by chart-topping Scottish singer-songwriter Emeli Sande, and a stand-up set by Joe Lycett, before returning to the stage to deliver some of his own new material. Former Labour Party politician Ed Balls plays Celebrity Send to All, and Michael gives one unsuspecting member of the public their 15 minutes of fame in Unexpected Star of the Show

programme.desc: Rachel and Phoebe see Chandler getting into a car with a mystery woman and follow them to a large house in the suburbs. They tell Monica of their fears and are shocked to hear the truth. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston, Lisa Kudrow and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where the Stripper Cries
programme.desc: Joey appears on quiz show The $100,000 Pyramid, but his disastrous efforts to answer the questions end up costing his partner the prize money. Meanwhile, the revellers at Phoebes hen party get a surprise once the stripper shows up. Guest starring Danny DeVito and Donny Osmond

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebes big day arrives, but wedding planner Monica and stand-in father of the bride Joey take their roles a little too seriously. To make matters worse, a blizzard hits New York and one of Mikes ushers is indisposed, forcing Ross and Chandler to step into the breach

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Speaks French
programme.desc: Joey persuades Phoebe to teach him French for an important audition, while Monica and Chandler show a pregnant Erica the sights of New York and learn more about the babys possible father. Guest starring Anna Faris and Ron Leibman

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel heads to a restaurant for a job interview, only to find herself sitting at a table within earshot of her current boss. Meanwhile, Monica and Chandler go house-hunting and Phoebe decides to change her name. Guest starring Paul Rudd and Dakota Fanning

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe learns Joeys agent has died, but he is so upset about his friends moving away that she decides not to tell him. Rachel worries about relocating to France, while Monica and Chandler are horrified to discover Janice is planning to buy the house next door to them. Guest starring Jane Lynch (Glee)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachels Going Away Party
programme.desc: The gang throws a going-away party for Rachel, but she prefers to say her goodbyes individually - and one of her friends is left feeling hurt at being overlooked. Meanwhile, Monica supervises the packing for a new life in the suburbs with Chandler, while also keeping a close eye on the mother of their future adopted child

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The Last One (Parts One and Two)
programme.desc: Double bill. The last-ever episode of the comedy sees the pals facing major changes. There is a surprise in store for Monica and Chandler when Erica finally gives birth to the child they are planning to adopt, Phoebe and Mike decide to start a family of their own and Rachel gets set to begin a new life in Paris. Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry and David Schwimmer star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: Pilot (The One Where Monica Gets a Room-mate)
programme.desc: The first-ever episode of the comedy, in which Rachel arrives at the local cafe after jilting her fiance at the altar. Chandler and Joey encourage Ross to enjoy bachelorhood when his lesbian wife walks out on him, while Phoebe supports herself playing guitar in the subway. Courteney Cox, Jennifer Aniston, David Schwimmer, Matthew Perry and Lisa Kudrow star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Sonogram at the End
programme.desc: Carol tells Ross she plans to raise his child with her lover Susan, but he can be involved if he wants. Ross and Monicas parents announce they are coming to dinner, while Rachel is aghast to discover her former fiance went on what would have been their honeymoon with her maid of honour

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica shows off her new boyfriend to the rest of the group, Chandler decides to take up smoking again and Phoebe makes a gruesome discovery that leads to her receiving a windfall. Starring Courteney Cox, Matthew Perry and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The girls end up breaking out binoculars in order to catch a glimpse of a good-looking neighbour with White House connections after accidentally receiving a pizza that he ordered, while Joey and Chandler take Ross to a ice hockey game to keep his mind busy

programme.desc: A power cut exposes Chandler to temptation by trapping him in a banks ATM lobby with only a stunning model for company. Ross has a hard time trying to ask Rachel out on a date, and Joey learns something interesting about Monica

programme.title: Junior (1994)
programme.desc: A fertility expert pioneers a treatment enabling men to become pregnant and carry babies to full term. programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Rock star-turned-zookeeper Scott plans a jungle-themed wedding for his bride-to-be Verity - and spends only £100 on a wedding dress for her, and £1,800 on life-size plastic animals to decorate their reception

programme.desc: In Belfast, Gemma and husband Jim serve up a healthy menu that caters for pescatarians as well carnivores. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Belfast compete to host the best dinner party and walk away with the cash prize of £1,000. programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.desc: The chef again comes to the aid of failing American restaurants, starting in Fishtown, Philadelphia, where he tries to help the three owners of the Hot Potato Cafe, which has not made a profit in two years. Spurred on by a scathing review by an influential critic, he makes radical changes to alter the staffs attitudes and create food that is up to his own exacting standards

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Flamangos restaurant in Whitehouse, New Jersey, where he tries to help the mother-and-daughter owners turn around their struggling businesss fortunes. programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.desc: Bryon Stephens, the president and chief operating officer of Marcos Pizza, dons a disguise to work incognito with his employees - from delivery drivers to managers - so that he can assess how the organisation and its many franchises are faring.

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to the upmarket quarter of Hollywood to help the owner of failing health-food restaurant Sante La Brea. As well as struggling to control his disrespectful staff, the proprietor receives a surprise visit from the police at the height of dinner service

programme.desc: After an overnight flight, the remaining racers arrive in Langkawi, off the west coast of Malaysia. Its an island paradise, but it tests the teams physically and mentally. programme.title: Naked Attraction

programme.desc: Three new couples prepare themselves for their first dinner party but, after the tension and strife of the last one, the atmosphere is far from welcoming

programme.desc: A nutrition student hoping to meet a man who is open with his feelings finds she is not used to compliments during a date with a football coach, and has to brush up on her flirting. programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsays next stop is Philadelphia, where family run restaurant Chiarellas is struggling to survive in an area full of thriving Italian eateries. Tommy and Dina Definos marriage is on the verge of collapse and his sense of personal failure only adds to the troubles of their crisis-ridden business

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A trip to an amusement park ends in disarray, prompting Homer to question the behaviour of his fellow man - and leading to an invitation for him to join a survivalist group preparing for the end of the world. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Springfield Elementary is threatened with closure over poor test scores, until it is revealed that one student missed the exam and could potentially save the school with an above-average mark. Unfortunately, that pupil turns out to be Bart - can he pull it out of the bag?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell makes a disturbing discovery following an awkward encounter with an old high-school flame, and wonders whether he unknowingly fathered a child in his straight days. programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Haley, Alex and Luke decide to surprise Phil and Claire with breakfast in bed, only to catch them in a compromising position. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer, Moe and Lenny go in pursuit of Carl when he skips town with $200,000 in winnings from a lottery ticket he bought with them. However, their search makes them realise how little they know about their friend and almost reaches a dead-end until Lisa points them in the direction of Iceland. Featuring music by Sigur Ros

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge is feeling neglected by Homer, and the timing couldnt be worse as their 10th wedding anniversary is fast approaching. Little does she know her husband is planning a grand romantic gesture inspired by a special moment from their first year of marriage. But wires get crossed when the miffed housewife stumbles upon a dodgy website for couples bored of their partners, and she ends up chatting to the too-good-to-be-true Ben (voiced by Family Guy creator Seth MacFarlane)

programme.desc: Britains favourite opinionated TV viewers share their sharp, insightful, passionate, and sometimes emotional critiques of 2023s biggest and best shows. My House Is Haunted, All Creatures Great and Small, Family Fortunes and Open House: The Great Sex Experiment

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Nicole is determined to avoid any association with singleton Bridget Jones. At first glance, Gary is no Mr Darcy, but the chartered surveyor assures her that this doesnt make him boring - while trying to determine how many bricks make up the restaurant. Bella - donned in a figure-hugging latex dress - seeks a like-minded chap willing to embrace the fetish world, and sets her hopes on Harrow boy Bertie. Meanwhile, fortysomething Jo is partnered with Richard Gere lookalike Gus, and Italian Paolo is paired with hotel receptionist Daniel

programme.title: Vicky Pattison: Maybe, Baby?
programme.desc: Part one of two. Vicky and her husband Ercan decide whether they should start a family. In this first episode of two, Vicky throws herself into finding out what life with a child might be like by helping to look after a friends young daughter. She also returns to the fertility clinic where her frozen eggs and embryos are being stored, confronting the reality of her ticking body clock

programme.title: Vicky Pattison: Maybe, Baby?
programme.desc: Vicky and Ercan explore more options for starting a family, meeting a mum who had her children through surrogacy and speaking to an adoptive mum as they continue searching for answers. But will these conversations help them make a decision on becoming parents, or lead them to the difficult realisation that parenthood isnt right for them?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Alexs new company puts her up at a new luxury apartment with full amenities - and a list of high-profile residents that everyone is eager to take advantage of, without her knowing. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer, Moe and Lenny go in pursuit of Carl when he skips town with $200,000 in winnings from a lottery ticket he bought with them. However, their search makes them realise how little they know about their friend and almost reaches a dead-end until Lisa points them in the direction of Iceland. Featuring music by Sigur Ros

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge is feeling neglected by Homer, and the timing couldnt be worse as their 10th wedding anniversary is fast approaching. Little does she know her husband is planning a grand romantic gesture inspired by a special moment from their first year of marriage. But wires get crossed when the miffed housewife stumbles upon a dodgy website for couples bored of their partners, and she ends up chatting to the too-good-to-be-true Ben (voiced by Family Guy creator Seth MacFarlane)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: The love restaurant opens its doors once more. Party boy Danny from Essex wants to leave his fun-loving ways behind and find a special woman to settle down with. But when he sits down with straight-talking hairdresser Lauren, he might have had a little too much Dutch courage. High-heel wearing Paolo is back for a second shot at love, meeting fellow Italian Mario, while single mum Claire is hoping Jordanian-born care worker and fellow divorcee Fadi might be the soulmate she is looking for

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Liverpool lass Alex sits down for a meal with union rep Sam, and they immediately click over their political beliefs - but she isnt too sure when he reveals his musical preferences. Three-times divorcee Zina meets undertaker to the stars Chris, whose job has so far been the kiss of death. Can he convince her he is a catch? DJ Charli sets Scott her usual test for any potential partner - seeing how he reacts to her friend Pascal, who she always carries round with her - and 33-year-old mummys boy Frank hopes confident gym beauty Nisha will see through his shyness

programme.title: Mary Berrys Easter Feast
programme.desc: Part one of two. Mary explores the roots of her faith through the medium of food, asking how Britain eats its way through Easter, and sharing her own favourite Easter recipes, including hot cross buns, Simnel cake and roast lamb. In this first episode, she discovers the traditions followed by diverse British families and communities during Lent and Good Friday, and the food that brings them together as each prepare for their Easter celebrations

programme.title: Mary Berrys Easter Feast
programme.desc: Part two of two. Mary explores the foods that bring different communities together on Easter Sunday, the most symbolic and meaningful feast in the Christian calendar. As well as sharing her own family favourites, Mary discovers how the Greek Orthodox community breaks the fast with tsoureki bread, spends a day with Archbishop of York John Sentamu and discovers Filipino and Italian Easter specialities. She also puts on a feast at her local church hall for everyone she has met along the way

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Its cake week, and the brand-new batch of bakers tackle mini cakes, a striking sponge and a scaled-down version of a home close to their hearts.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers tackle illusion macarons and a fruity favourite, before unleashing their creativity by making a dramatic 3D mask entirely from biscuits.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers are hoping for a Hollywood handshake this week as they tackle bread, the steely-eyed judges speciality. They begin by putting their stamp on a classic pizza, then are asked to make a classic pastry in the technical challenge. For the showstopper, they tackle the decorative Danish sandwich cake the smorgastarta. Who will claim star baker - and who will be hanging up their apron?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers take on three challenges exploring authentic Mexican bakes, as they put their twist on the classic sweet bread pan dulce for the Signature, tackle a Mexican street food staple in the Technical, and make their own showstopping version of the milk-soaked tres leches cake. Which bakers will impress Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood enough to keep their place in the tent, and who will be heading home? Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas host dessert week, which sees the amateur bakers attempting a trio of sticky challenges. They get all steamed up in the signature, tackle a classic lemon meringue in the technical and for the showstopper are tasked with creating a sponge cake with a surprise inside. Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood are on hand to taste the results - and decide who will be leaving this week

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Halloween comes early for the bakers as they tackle a trio of seasonal challenges, including a signature in the form of an apple cake and a moreish technical. For the showstopper, the amateurs are asked to create a piñata perfect for any spooky celebration. Hosted by Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas, with Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood deciding who will be leaving this week

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers are back in the world of desserts for custard week, which sees them serving up floating islands, a summer staple in the technical and a showstopping set gateau that uses custard as the basis. Will any of them prove good enough to win a Hollywood handshake? Hosted by Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas host as the bakers face pastry week. Each baker must show their vol-au-vent making skills, demonstrate a technical ability in creating a savoury snack and finally craft a showstopping 3D pie-scape depicting their favourite story from childhood. With only four places in the semi-final, who will be leaving the competition for good?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Its the semi-final, and the bakers tackle mini charlottes, a vertical technical challenge and a Swedish showstopper. Who will soar into the final

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The finalists have one last chance to impress judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith with their creations in the hope of being crowned 2022 winner. The remaining contestants have to put together the perfect picnic for the signature challenge and create a summer classic for the technical. In the final showstopper challenge, the bakers must make a celebration of the planet

programme.title: Hometown Homicide
programme.desc: The case of 15-year-old student Danielle Locklear, who disappeared from her North Carolina home in 2014. programme.title: Hometown Homicide

programme.desc: Ann Metz lives for her family. Her husband Marshall despises Ann giving her time to anyone but him, and he will do anything to keep hold of her

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: An instance in which a fire chiefs wife was found burnt to death in her home. An autopsy revealed the cause of death as a gunshot to the head, shocking a small Louisiana town

programme.title: Diabolical: Deadly Love

programme.desc: Peggy, 85, arrives at the hospital by ambulance, having injured her knee at home. Its the second time she has fallen in two months and medics want to find out if theres a more serious underlying cause. Meanwhile, the team keeps a close eye on 75-year-old Bob, who has had a suspected heart attack, and Ben, 25, isnt overly concerned by his swollen finger, until a doctor diagnoses cellulitis

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Schoolboy Eddie, 12, is brought into AandE having been hit by a car on his way home from school, and doctors are concerned he may have suffered a bleed on the brain, as well as damage to his kidneys. Meanwhile, 64-year-old Linda, who breathes with the help of a tracheostomy, arrives at Kings after experiencing respiratory failure at home, and student Amy, 20, has been coughing up blood

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: This weeks campers - Simon and Emmy, Sean and Marie, and Jen, Ian and Ellis - arrive at Blair Castle Caravan Park at the edge of the Cairngorms National Park

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition takes place in and around Leeds, where the first host, 38-year-old choir teacher Dionne, serves up a menu that combines European and Caribbean influences and celebrates her family favourites, with a carnival flourish thrown in for good measure

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Finance director Jane hosts the second night in Leeds. Her plan to grab the grand is to treat her guests to a night of fine dining, but she has her work cut out. Drama teacher Denver is already on the back foot with Jane, after taking offence to being called a goth on the first night. Car painter Darren is concerned that Janes menu of home-made ravioli, pork and panna cotta could win the week, but hes less impressed when it gets to the table. Painter and decorator Billy has noticed a chilling change among some of the other diners and Dionne is just glad her night is out the way so she can enjoy the rest of the week

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Drama teacher and DJ Denver hosts the third dinner party in Leeds, with a Spanish-inspired menu that also includes a prosecco van and stilt walkers on arrival

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Billy serves up a menu of dinner-party favourites on the fourth evening in Leeds, and after an appearance from a Frank Sinatra impersonator, he has high hopes of pocketing the cash

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final night of the contest in Leeds finds Darren planning to put a fancy twist on what seems to be a basic menu. Denver still hasnt forgiven Jane to likening her to a goth on the first evening and the fact that Darren is serving goats cheese rubs salt in her wounds. Billy is concerned about the amount of mustard Darren is using in his dishes and mother-of-five Dionne causes a commotion when she offers up a hug to Jane

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Mark and Caroline want a bolthole on Spains stunning Orihuela Costa that works for all the family and is close to the golf courses. Scarlette Douglas shows them what their £100,000 budget can secure

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Janet and Andrew have been longing to retire to the Spanish sunshine of the western Costa del Sol for 10 years, so call on the expertise of Danni Menzies to seek put five impressive properties for their budget of £200,000 to for them to choose between

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lee Juggurnauth jets off to the historic town of Mojácar in Spains Almería region to help house-hunters Christine and Howard find the perfect holiday home. After 30 years of marriage and a few difficult years back at home, the couple have decided its finally the right time to fulfil their long-held dream of buying a place in the sun. Lee sources five properties within their £50,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Hazel searches for a holiday home in Malaga, with help from her friend Paula and guidance from Scarlette Douglas, who lines up five properties within her budget of £250,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jo and DP are looking for a holiday home in Nerja on Spains ever-popular Costa del Sol that they can escape to in the winter and rent out in the summer to support them in their retirement. Ben Hillman lines up five options for the pair to consider

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help a pair of baptist ministers with their four-bedroom in Alnwick, Northumberland. Having grown up on the same street, Chris is ready for a change of scenery and a bigger, more user-friendly space for combining work and family needs - including fitting up to 14 people round a dining table. Caroline, however, loves their home, and particularly the neighbours who brought her, Chris and their teenagers comfort while she was undergoing cancer treatment

programme.title: George Clarkes Remarkable Renovations
programme.desc: George meets Matt, who bought a Victorian terrace in Laceby with a derelict bakery in the back garden. Most people would have knocked it down or used it for storage but not Matt. He hatched a plan to convert it into a home for his sister Charlene and nephew Louis. A home on one level would be life-changing for them, but the renovation isnt easy, as Matt wants to work to a tight £50,000 budget and do most of the work himself

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at The Bickford Arms in Holsworthy, Devon, where self-confessed rookie Keith Reynolds hopes his charisma can win over his more experienced rivals. BandB veteran Collette and her bar supervisor Danny think their bathroom is a bit grubby, and Mike and Justin find some problematic paintwork. At the breakfast table, Abby causes commotion ordering a poached egg and Collette makes it clear that only awkward people order them. Collettes honesty doesnt end there, as she reveals that her sausages are better than Keiths, leaving her rivals with high expectations

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Abby Norton welcomes her fellow hoteliers to Newchester Farmhouse BandB in Merriott, Somerset. Collette and Danny are impressed by the superstar quality beds, although Justin and Mike find the linen lacking - and Keith just misses modern technology

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third stay is at the Quay Inn in Minehead, Somerset, where Collette Whiteoak and Danny Kelly are confident their traditional pub atmosphere will be a hit with their rivals. But there are a few cleanliness issues, and the battle of the banger continues over breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Justin Head and Mike Smyth host the final visit of the week at Old Walls Vineyard Luxury Lodges in Bishopsteignton in Devon. On arrival, Abby is captivated by the stunning location, but Collette and Danny find fault with their luxury lodge. During breakfast, Danny deems his egg more greasy spoon than fancy bistro. Come feedback time, Justin and Mike are left feeling furious

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers meet for the last time to find out how much theyve been paid and to settle some scores. Keith clears up Collettes cleanliness critique, as well as the paintwork problems flagged by Mike and Justin. Abby gets to grips with Keiths lack of TV and wi-fi provision, and Collette and Danny want to tackle Mike and Justins cleanliness comments

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Doctors Jonathan and Ruth examine a motorcyclist who cant feel his legs after he collided with a car. A dentistry student evacuated out of the Middle East has shocking shrapnel wounds, and Dr Tsung fears that she may lose her eye. Meanwhile, doctors Manny and Scott must quickly reset the shoulder of an apprentice electrician who has losing the feeling in his hand

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Doctors are concerned that 38-year-old Stacie may be paralysed following a fall from a tree at a friends all-night party, while 19-year-old veterinary student Ashleigh is rushed into AandE after being involved in a high-speed head-on car crash. Elsewhere, Peter, 78, arrives at Kings with abdominal pains, and as he receives treatment, he paints a picture of his eventful life

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the treatment of sport enthusiasts who have had accidents on two wheels. Billy, 19, has been thrown 20ft from his motocross bike during a race, suffering multiple spinal injuries. Teacher Dave, 53, has facial injuries after riding his new bicycle into the back of a stationary car in Richmond Park, while 30-year-old adrenaline junkie and former Royal Marine Richard has badly dislocated his thumb after falling off a bike

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Doctors Jonathan and Ruth examine a motorcyclist who cant feel his legs after he collided with a car. A dentistry student evacuated out of the Middle East has shocking shrapnel wounds, and Dr Tsung fears that she may lose her eye. Meanwhile, doctors Manny and Scott must quickly reset the shoulder of an apprentice electrician who has losing the feeling in his hand

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Doctors are concerned that 38-year-old Stacie may be paralysed following a fall from a tree at a friends all-night party, while 19-year-old veterinary student Ashleigh is rushed into AandE after being involved in a high-speed head-on car crash. Elsewhere, Peter, 78, arrives at Kings with abdominal pains, and as he receives treatment, he paints a picture of his eventful life

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside one of Britains busiest AandE departments at Kings College Hospital in south London. Its Red Nose Day, but theres little to laugh about for 33-year-old Dilson, who is rushed in with knife wounds to his head and neck after being attacked outside a nightclub. Meanwhile, 79-year-old Doreen has broken her wrist in a fall at home, and parents Keeley and Michael are concerned by the fact their toddler Cydney hasnt urinated for two days

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: Midway through their tour of the Scottish Highlands, Sean and Marie, Jen, Ian and Ellis, and Simon and Emmy pitch up at Ben Nevis Holiday Park, at the foot of the famous landmark

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Gemma turns an old TV cabinet into a luxury dog bed, while Henry trades in his lifelong love of mechanicals to upcycle wooden furniture

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien visit Oxford to meet Rosemary, whose father owned a second-hand goods shop. They discover a servants call bell and a mysterious pedal-powered tool, which Simon is anxious to restore

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Carly Cornwalls Juniperlea Inn in Midlothian. Straight away, her guests are taken aback by the stylish decor. However, a roadside location leaves Barney with a sleepless night. At feedback time, Carlys shocked to find out that one guest wouldnt return to her BandB

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals arrive at Starshinezzz in County Durham, where laid-back host Dave Taylor hopes his renowned hospitality will make him a winner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests are charmed by Barney Smiths Hobbit-style accommodation at the Hideaway at Baxby Manor in North Yorkshire - although the loos are not quite what they expected

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The Hideout Hotel in Hull, run by Jodie Richardson and Enya Donohoe, is the final destination of the week. The hands-off check-in and self-catered apartments prove popular with some guests, but Barney kicks up a stink in the bathroom. During the DIY breakfast, Jodies handling of a smoky situation sets alarm bells ringing for Carly and Lydia, and feedback leaves the hosts fired up with payment day looming

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On payment day, Carly from the Juniperlea Inn is keen for Barney to enlighten her on the reasons behind his sleep issues. Barney is in the spotlight again when his payment to Jodie and Enya makes tensions run high. There are plenty of differences to be debated before the winner is announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This competition comes from Blackpool and Preston, where the first host, 26-year-old student and barmaid Rachel, plans an American diner-themed menu. Its a menu that confuses her guests, but they all agrees that her hosting rocks

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Lady of leisure Jill is second to host in and around Blackpool and Preston, leaving no stone unturned in her effort to impress her guests with an Italian-themed menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Cabin crew member Mark throws the third dinner party of the week, hoping to impress his guests with an evening of fine dining and first class hosting

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Parole officer Bernard takes over hosting duties in Blackpool and Preston, hoping to woo his guests with a combination of northern soul and delicious grub. But a squabble over the starter results in a walk-out during the main course

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the final day in Blackpool and Preston and health assistant Lisa is banking on her no-faff menu to bag the cash. However, its not going to be easy, especially after the criticisms that have been free-flowing across the week. Home truths are revealed and temperatures soar, especially when Bernard gets the shock of his life as hes labelled boring, and he in turn tells Mark that he has been a drama queen. Lisa realises she needs to act quickly to change the atmosphere or risk losing out on the prize

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off in Woburn Sands, Buckinghamshire, where self-confessed novice Toni Kupitz runs Woodleys Farmhouse. Engaged couple Ian and Karen get bugged out by a surprise in their bedroom, while sisters Georgie and Frankie are excited about their immaculate bathroom. After an arty day out, BandB veteran Ian rattles some cages over dinner, by revealing his extensive hospitality background

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Eddie and Karen Deighton host their rivals at Finch Cottage in Wilsford cum Lake, Wiltshire. They pride themselves on providing a personal experience, but the lack of TVs in the rooms is a big turn-off for some guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third destination is the Bell Inn in Thorpe-le-Soken, Essex, where hospitality manager Ian Hawthorne and his fiancee Karen Hunt are confident they can satisfy their guests. But Frankie is less than pleased by the view from her room and one pair of guests are still in a bad mood over their feedback earlier in the week

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Sisters Georgie Monaghan and Frankie Gallies Frasers Guest House in Battlesbridge, Essex, is the final stop of the weeks competition. Frasers boasts a unique location in an antiques district, but some guests are left questioning whether the mattresses are heirlooms too when they discover a few unappealing stains. After spending the day exploring an antiques yard, Georgie and Frankie treat their guests to milkshakes at their family-run diner. Talk soon turns to payment day, making for a tense end to the evening

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last day of the competition sees the BandBers eager to challenge each other about the feedback theyve received, as Toni from Woodleys Farmhouse wants to know how she can improve her breakfast service. When one pair accuses another of game playing, things start to get emotional before the winning BandB is announced.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp goes property hunting in the trendy suburb of Heaton in Newcastle, to help Tom and Liz find a new home as they are tired of renting flats. Elsewhere, Phil Spencer is in the Tyne Valley searching for a family home for couple Michael and Sorrel, who only have two months left in their current rental property

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer head to Warwickshire to help Gill and John, a couple who cant agree what to do with their inherited two-bedroom home. With two growing children, John cant see this house ever working and hopes that a move closer to town will appeal to the kids as they become teenagers but Gills fond memories of her mum and the countryside on their doorstep mean that she cant imagine living anywhere else. Faced with a challenging layout, a long list of requirements and soaring build costs, Kirstie needs to find a solution with her £150,000 love-it budget. Meanwhile, Phil has a tricky task convincing Gill to list it but is determined to find three spectacular houses with enough space for the whole family, in an area with plenty going on

programme.title: Our Farm Next Door: Amanda, Clive and Kids
programme.desc: Builder Richard grapples with the challenge of moving oak ceiling beams into position while, over at Ravenseat, Clive picks up the tweezers to get his sheep looking their best for the sales. An incredible discovery could reveal a wealth of information about Anty Johns 19th-century resident Anthony Clarkson. And, as winter draws in, the building is finally scaffolding-free

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The trauma team at St Georges Hospital in south-west London fights to save the life of a young woman involved in a motorbike accident, which has completely severed her right leg below the knee. An 11-year-old boy is brought in after having a prolonged epileptic seizure, and a 19-year-old arrives with a sewing needle stuck in her foot, but she seems more keen on taking advice from her mum in Bulgaria than from the doctor

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Former boxer Paul, 22, has been stabbed in the face and arm with a broken bottle outside a nightclub in Kingston. As the team works to stop the bleeding and treat the patients wounds, his girlfriend Naveena reflects on his sensitive side. Angela, 93, is brought to AandE by her daughter Elizabeth after suffering from blood loss and disorientation at her care home, while 70-year-old John arrives with his wife Francesca after falling while out running and dislocating his shoulder. To get Johns pain under control quickly the medics give him ketamine, and the hallucinogenic side effects keep everyone entertained

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Heli-medics in the East Midlands race to free Valerie from her car after it was t-boned by a lorry. In Norwich, the medics rush to the aid of 15-year-old Henry whos fallen 20 feet when a large kite dragged him off his feet into the air, and medics suspect Ellana may have a serious head injury after a road traffic collision in Leicester trapped her in her vehicle

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The trauma team at St Georges Hospital in south-west London fights to save the life of a young woman involved in a motorbike accident, which has completely severed her right leg below the knee.
