The hands-off check-in and self-catered apartments prove popular with some guests, but Barney kicks up a stink in the bathroom. During the DIY breakfast, Jodies handling of a smoky situation sets alarm bells ringing for Carly and Lydia, and feedback leaves the hosts fired up with payment day looming

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On payment day, Carly from the Juniperlea Inn is keen for Barney to enlighten her on the reasons behind his sleep issues. Barney is in the spotlight again when his payment to Jodie and Enya makes tensions run high. There are plenty of differences to be debated before the winner is announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This competition comes from Blackpool and Preston, where the first host, 26-year-old student and barmaid Rachel, plans an American diner-themed menu. Its a menu that confuses her guests, but they all agrees that her hosting rocks

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Lady of leisure Jill is second to host in and around Blackpool and Preston, leaving no stone unturned in her effort to impress her guests with an Italian-themed menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Cabin crew member Mark throws the third dinner party of the week, hoping to impress his guests with an evening of fine dining and first class hosting

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Parole officer Bernard takes over hosting duties in Blackpool and Preston, hoping to woo his guests with a combination of northern soul and delicious grub. But a squabble over the starter results in a walk-out during the main course

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the final day in Blackpool and Preston and health assistant Lisa is banking on her no-faff menu to bag the cash. However, its not going to be easy, especially after the criticisms that have been free-flowing across the week. Home truths are revealed and temperatures soar, especially when Bernard gets the shock of his life as hes labelled boring, and he in turn tells Mark that he has been a drama queen. Lisa realises she needs to act quickly to change the atmosphere or risk losing out on the prize

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off in Woburn Sands, Buckinghamshire, where self-confessed novice Toni Kupitz runs Woodleys Farmhouse. Engaged couple Ian and Karen get bugged out by a surprise in their bedroom, while sisters Georgie and Frankie are excited about their immaculate bathroom. After an arty day out, BandB veteran Ian rattles some cages over dinner, by revealing his extensive hospitality background

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Eddie and Karen Deighton host their rivals at Finch Cottage in Wilsford cum Lake, Wiltshire. They pride themselves on providing a personal experience, but the lack of TVs in the rooms is a big turn-off for some guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third destination is the Bell Inn in Thorpe-le-Soken, Essex, where hospitality manager Ian Hawthorne and his fiancee Karen Hunt are confident they can satisfy their guests. But Frankie is less than pleased by the view from her room and one pair of guests are still in a bad mood over their feedback earlier in the week

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Sisters Georgie Monaghan and Frankie Gallies Frasers Guest House in Battlesbridge, Essex, is the final stop of the weeks competition. Frasers boasts a unique location in an antiques district, but some guests are left questioning whether the mattresses are heirlooms too when they discover a few unappealing stains. After spending the day exploring an antiques yard, Georgie and Frankie treat their guests to milkshakes at their family-run diner. Talk soon turns to payment day, making for a tense end to the evening

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last day of the competition sees the BandBers eager to challenge each other about the feedback theyve received, as Toni from Woodleys Farmhouse wants to know how she can improve her breakfast service. When one pair accuses another of game playing, things start to get emotional before the winning BandB is announced.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp goes property hunting in the trendy suburb of Heaton in Newcastle, to help Tom and Liz find a new home as they are tired of renting flats. Elsewhere, Phil Spencer is in the Tyne Valley searching for a family home for couple Michael and Sorrel, who only have two months left in their current rental property

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer head to Warwickshire to help Gill and John, a couple who cant agree what to do with their inherited two-bedroom home. With two growing children, John cant see this house ever working and hopes that a move closer to town will appeal to the kids as they become teenagers but Gills fond memories of her mum and the countryside on their doorstep mean that she cant imagine living anywhere else. Faced with a challenging layout, a long list of requirements and soaring build costs, Kirstie needs to find a solution with her £150,000 love-it budget. Meanwhile, Phil has a tricky task convincing Gill to list it but is determined to find three spectacular houses with enough space for the whole family, in an area with plenty going on

programme.title: Our Farm Next Door: Amanda, Clive and Kids
programme.desc: Builder Richard grapples with the challenge of moving oak ceiling beams into position while, over at Ravenseat, Clive picks up the tweezers to get his sheep looking their best for the sales. An incredible discovery could reveal a wealth of information about Anty Johns 19th-century resident Anthony Clarkson. And, as winter draws in, the building is finally scaffolding-free

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The trauma team at St Georges Hospital in south-west London fights to save the life of a young woman involved in a motorbike accident, which has completely severed her right leg below the knee. An 11-year-old boy is brought in after having a prolonged epileptic seizure, and a 19-year-old arrives with a sewing needle stuck in her foot, but she seems more keen on taking advice from her mum in Bulgaria than from the doctor

programme.title: Pirates: Behind the Legends

He gained momentum through the Caribbean, before blockading Charleston and fighting a bloody battle

programme.title: Pirates: Behind the Legends

programme.title: Pirates: Behind the Legends

programme.title: The Endurance
programme.desc: The Endurance recounts one of the historys greatest tales of survival, Sir Ernest Shackletons 1914-1916 expedition to Antarctica. programme.title: Everest: The South West Face
programme.desc: An in depth look at Chris Boningtons 1975 expedition to climb the South West face of Mt Everest and put the very first British mountaineers on the summit. In the face of overwhelming odds, dwindling oxygen supplies, freezing Jet Stream winds, avalanche, frostbite, widespread public negativity and the press reporting that failure was almost inevitable - a British team succeeded - where all others had failed

programme.desc: In 1963 a chair, owned by Michaels parents, was used during a visit to Galway by John F Kennedy. programme.title: Tracing the Rails
programme.desc: Stephen Cranford uncovers the history of a lost railway line. From steam train memories to fascinating relics

programme.title: Jack Hargreaves Old Country
programme.desc: Jack is in his cottage garden and concludes that no matter how long you have been gardening you can never understand it. He then goes fishing at one of his nearby watermills.

programme.title: Stereo Underground
programme.desc: Richard Latto presents alternative anthems from a music community with attitude.

programme.title: The Dustbinmen
programme.desc: On his way to the bank, Bloody Delilah spots the deserted Thunderbird 3 and finds the lads having a tea break in a nearby garden.

programme.title: Agony
programme.desc: Sitcom about an agony columnist on a womens magazine who advises on other peoples problems but cannot solve her own. Starring Maureen Lipman and Simon Williams

programme.title: Second Thoughts
programme.desc: Bill asks Faith to celebrate moving in together by painting the town red, but she has other priorities to consider. Comedy, with James Bolam, Lynda Bellingham and Belinda Lang

programme.title: The Fenn Street Gang
programme.desc: Duffy and Sharon?s rocky relationship gets tougher as they grow up. Sharon meets a thoughtful student, Duffy faces real competition, and pressure builds until something has to change.

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: The team reconstructs the last voyage of a nuclear submarine when its entire crew is found dead in mysterious circumstances. Fantasy drama, starring William Gaunt, Alexandra Bastedo and Stuart Damon

programme.title: Drop the Dead Donkey
programme.desc: A documentary crew films the staff at GlobeLink, and Sir Roystons son Roy Jr visits the staff. Dave faces a dilemma when he gets lucky on the lottery

programme.title: Drop the Dead Donkey
programme.desc: Gus tries to boost ratings by making the news as sensationalist as he can, and George starts looking after a badger

programme.title: Brimstone and Treacle (1982)
programme.desc: Asinister stranger worms his way into a middle-aged couples home by offering to take care of their comatose daughter - but it is only once hes part of the family that his true nature shines through. Drama based on Dennis Potters TV play, starring Sting, Denholm Elliott, Joan Plowright and Suzanna Hamilton

programme.title: Orgy of the Dead (1965)
programme.desc: A writer and his girlfriend stumble into a graveyard ruled by the Dark Master, forced to witness eerie undead rituals that blur the line between horror, desire, and the bizarre. Horror, starring Pat Barrington and Fawn Silver

programme.title: Stereo Underground
programme.desc: Richard Latto presents alternative anthems from a music community with attitude.

programme.title: Rewind Time Machine
programme.desc: Actor Michael Caine is interviewed on the set of The Eagle Has Landed movie in 1971.

programme.title: Hank the Cowboy

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Beryl Cook
programme.desc: A look into the world of Beryl Cook, one of Britain?s most popular painters?an irreverent grandmother known for bold art featuring royal fantasies and cheeky scenes like a ?female flasher?.

programme.title: We Had One of Those
programme.desc: Alex Dyke learns about another popular car from our past when he visits the National Motor Museum at Beaulieu.

programme.title: Flash Gordons Trip to Mars
programme.desc: The rocket ship suffers damage from the nitron lamp and is forced to land. Ming recognises a piece of debris and convinces Azura that the party from Earth must be stopped.

programme.title: Lady Killers
programme.desc: The story of Mary Pearce, who was convicted of murdering her lovers wife and baby in 1890.

programme.title: Tracing the Rails
programme.desc: Stephen Cranford uncovers the history of a lost railway line. From steam train memories to fascinating relics

programme.title: Jack Hargreaves Old Country
programme.desc: Jack Hargreaves demonstrates that a horse harness is more than a just pile of straps. He then visits dog trainers, John and Mary Holmes.

programme.title: The Tommy Tiernan Show
programme.desc: Chat show in which neither the presenter nor the viewers are told the identity of the guests in advance. With the comedian in the dark about who he will be interviewing until they walk out to greet him, anything can happen - especially if Tommy doesnt have a clue who they are

programme.title: Papillon (1973)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about a Frenchman wrongly imprisoned for life for a crime he did not commit, who made an extraordinarily courageous bid to escape from the notorious Devils Island - a former leper colony turned into a maximum-security prison. Starring Steve McQueen, Dustin Hoffman, Anthony Zerbe, Don Gordon and George Coulouris

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: The United Britain beauty contest comes to Slaughter Abbey, and Miss Northern Ireland - one of the three favourites - is found dead in the swimming pool. Sister Boniface deduces murder from a blow to the back of the head. Drama, starring Lorna Watson

programme.title: Frankie Drake Mysteries
programme.desc: When a magicians assistant is killed, Frankie goes undercover to find the culprit. But can she see clearly through the smoke and mirrors?

programme.title: Easter Sunday Mass
programme.desc: Live from the Franciscan convent in Pariss 14th arrondisement, the most important feast in the Christian calendar is celebrated with a Eurovision Mass that commemorates the 800th anniversary of the death of St Francis of Assisi. Mass presided over by Frederic-Marie Le Mehaute

programme.title: Sunday Worship
programme.desc: The Rev Paul Maxwell leads an Easter service from the East Belfast Methodist Mission with bible readings, music and drama

programme.title: Urbi et Orbi
programme.desc: Pope Leo XIVs Easter Blessing from St. Peters Basilica in Rome.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at Dublin Zoo with the animals who live there and the keepers dedicated to looking after them. Six-month-old gorilla Asali is keeping mother Kafi and the rest of the troop on their toes, while first-time father Bangui gets a little parental training. Taishi the snow leopards health is giving the animal care team cause for concern, and the Asian elephants cool off in their pool on a hot summer day

programme.title: RTÉ News: One OClock and Weather
Home of the Year
programme.desc: Judges Hugh Wallace, Amanda Bone and Siobhán Lam examine Robert and Graces refined extension in Dublin, which gave them additional space and an even larger back garden. Theres also Paul and Joesphines Victorian manse in Donegal, which they spent over three years restoring to its former glory, as well as Vivienne and Endas modern dormer self-build in Kilkenny

programme.title: The Hardacres
programme.desc: Sam is hopeful his latest venture on the docks will not only help his old friends, but also give Joe some much-needed purpose, making him a manager, along with old pal Fred. The Hardacres mask their nerves as Harry sets off to a prestigious boarding school, but Mary quickly finds distraction in a surprising proposition from Lady Emma and Adella

programme.title: Irelands Wild Islands
programme.desc: Eoin Warner visits Co Kerrys Maharees Islands, where Arctic terns return every summer to raise their chicks, before witnessing the many grey seals on the beach of Great Blasket Island. He heads to Skellig Michael, where the monastery is home to a secretive bird that comes every year from Antarctic waters to raise its chicks in the monks ancient cells

programme.title: Emma (1996)
programme.desc: A privileged, headstrong young woman, who believes she is an expert in matters of the heart, sets about matchmaking between her friends - little realising she is falling in love herself and risks missing out on a chance of happiness. Period drama adapted from Jane Austens novel, starring Gwyneth Paltrow, Ewan McGregor, Jeremy Northam, Toni Collette, Greta Scacchi and Juliet Stevenson

programme.desc: The latest news headlines

programme.title: RTÉ News
programme.desc: National and international news.

programme.title: The Angelus
programme.desc: Artist Aideen Connolly attempts to capture the beauty and peace of Ballindoon Abbey, a ruin on the Sligo/Leitrim border that is treasured by locals

programme.title: RTÉ News: Six One and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international headlines

programme.title: Cheap European Homes
programme.desc: Retired cardiac nurse and psychotherapist Nuala, from Wexford, is embracing the next chapter of her life by searching for a home near the Canal du Midi in Beziers in France. She has spent most of her years travelling through France in her camper van and now hopes to establish a permanent base where her family, especially her grandchildren, can share in her love of French culture

programme.title: The Money List
programme.desc: Shane from Galway and Rachel from Offaly take on Karen from Donegal and Conor from Dublin. The winners will go on to face new challengers Ruben from Limerick and Laura from Kildare. Hosted by Baz Ashmawy

programme.title: Fair City
programme.desc: Mondo fears for his future as the jury reach a verdict, Hayley hopes to finally get justice for her father, and Paul and Nicola reconcile, but an unexpected turn of events brings Pauls world crashing down

programme.title: RTÉ News: Nine OClock and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news

programme.title: The Great House Revival
programme.desc: Jill Leavy trades her Dublin home hunt for a bold renovation, transforming her dads abandoned 1932 primary school in Coralstown into her first home

programme.title: Leonard and Hungry Paul
programme.desc: During his shift as a casual postman, Hungry Paul delivers a letter to himself with good news. Leonard asks Shelley to lunch and they spend an hour together, which feels like the start of something. With a proper date planned with her for that evening, Leonard cancels his usual game night with Hungry Paul. Discombobulated, Hungry Paul goes to visit Mrs Hawthorn, but realises the chocolates bought for the hospital nurses have exceeded their sell-by date. Incensed he brings them to the local shop and demands recompense. Comedy, narrated by Julia Roberts and starring Alex Lawther and Laurie Kynaston

programme.title: The Gone
programme.desc: When journalist Aileen Ryan goes missing, Irish detective Theo Richter and Kiwi detective Diana Huia are compelled to remain in the small town of Mt Affinity in New Zealand and lead the search. After discovering Aileen went missing while chasing a lead on the towns historical Mountain Murders, the detectives enter a game of cat and mouse with the Goatman. Thriller, starring Richard Flood

programme.title: Rebus
programme.desc: The wife of prominent charity campaigner Gregor Jack is murdered, and Rebus wonders whether her husband committed the crime - especially as he was recently spotted patronising a brothel. Jacks PA and publicist seem to have secrets to hide, but when evidence linking the victim to a convicted sex offender also comes to light, the detective must figure out which of his suspects is really responsible. Ken Stott stars

programme.title: Lucan
programme.desc: Having acquired the medical notes of Lucans plastic surgeon from more than 50 years earlier, Neil Berriman starts his own analyses. He finds a tiny nick in the nostril that may be a crucial key to identifying Lucan, and maps out ways in which the fugitive lord might have continued to use plastic surgery to alter his facial features. Eventually Neil meets the man he believes killed his mother

programme.desc: Mondo takes the stand, causing a ruction in the courtroom. As the trial concludes, Mondos fate awaits him. Hayley is left devastated when Sharon speaks her truth. Pauls lie to Nicola is exposed, but has he blown his chance with her?

programme.title: The End of the World with Beanz
programme.desc: Martin Beanz Warde travel to Dandora dump in Kenya following the trail of Irelands textile waste. Joined by comedian Gearoid Farrelly, they meet a local hip hop group, a recycling fashionista and members of The Maasai - the original upcyclers

programme.title: Cheaper By the Dozen (2003)
programme.desc: A large family moves to a new town, hoping for a fresh start - but nothing goes according to plan, and the unlucky dad ends up in charge of his 12 rowdy children while his wife goes on a promotional book tour. Remake of the 1950 comedy, starring Steve Martin, Bonnie Hunt, Piper Perabo, Tom Welling and Hilary Duff

programme.title: RTÉ News: Six One and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international headlines

programme.title: For Peats Sake
programme.desc: The vital role turf has played in Ireland and the battle that ensued when the EU tried to stop Irish people cutting turf. For thousands of years people in Ireland have cut turf to heat their homes and cook their food. It was an accessible, affordable and vital fuel, made from the very soil of Ireland itself. Then in the 1990s people realised that there was a lot more to bogs than cheap fuel

programme.title: 10 Things to Know About
programme.desc: This episode explores the challenges of growing food in Ireland amid extreme weather and global instability

programme.title: Slan Go Feoil
programme.desc: At Bia Dingle, one of Irelands most iconic food festivals, Clare and her husband Mick reflect on how a month without meat has changed them - and what theyll carry forward. Conor and Storm return to the doctor, where Conor receives unexpected good news. Also, Nora breaks down how everyones blood results shifted over the month

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Jasmine receives a visitor, Nicola is left frustrated, and Ross and Harvey hatch a plan

programme.title: RTÉ News: Nine OClock and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news

programme.title: No Time to Die (2021)
programme.desc: James Bond has left active service and is enjoying a life of tranquility in Jamaica. However, his peaceful retirement is disturbed when old CIA friend Felix Leiter turns up asking for help. Bond then sets off on the trail of an enigmatic villain armed with lethal new technology. Its a case that turns out to be more personal than ever for the super-spy - and has far-reaching consequences. Cary Joji Fukunagas action thriller, starring Daniel Craig in his fifth and final outing as 007. With Lea Seydoux, Rami Malek, Ana de Armas and Christoph Waltz

programme.title: Wolf Hall
programme.desc: A rebellion in the north, fanned by the kings cousin Reginald Pole with intent to force England back to Rome, is spreading south. The rebels are demanding a stop to the religious reforms of the past three years, a return to Rome and Cromwells head, perceiving him to be the architect of their misfortunes. The royal adviser has been left undone by his experiences at Shaftesbury Abbey, and struggles to navigate the increasingly dangerous atmosphere at court

programme.title: Mrs Robinson
programme.desc: Former president of Ireland Mary Robinson tells her story, illuminating battles for justice and equality of over half a century - on the streets, in the courts, at the ballot box, and in backroom corridors of power. This documentary follows her journey from reforming constitutional lawyer and Senator to becoming a crusading UN High Commissioner

programme.title: Avoidance
programme.desc: On a trip to Yorkshire, Claire forces Jonathan to lie to her parents about their break-up, a lie that goes way too far. Dan and Courtney go on respective mums and dads nights out. The professor calls Dan asking for an answer on the job, so she seeks advice from her fellow dads. The nights are both very different, but Courtneys ends with a shock revelation as Dan makes a decision about her dream job. Comedy, guest starring Paula Wilcox, with Romesh Ranganathan, Jessica Knappett and Aisling Bea

This episode travels across the border to hear how the game and its players fared through a century of strife

programme.desc: A 1973 concert featuring Elvis Presley singing 25 of his greatest hits, including Blue Suede Shoes, Hound Dog and Suspicious Minds. The film was a milestone in music history, originally transmitted live around the world via satellite

programme.desc: Elvis Presley, the King of Rock n Roll, captured the hearts of millions through his chart-topping music. After briefly leaving music to serve the Us military, Elvis returned to show business with a string of successful movies. However, behind the gates of Graceland, the King faced battles on several fronts that threatened his career, his love - and even his life

programme.title: Urban Myths
programme.desc: The much-loved stand-up comedian flees to Paris in the mid-1960s to pursue his dream of becoming a novelist, but winds up becoming a pianist in a brothel. The comedy anthology returns with an instalment written by and starring Steve Pemberton, with Mark Addy and John Bradley

programme.title: Urban Myths
programme.desc: A 16-year-old Barbra Streisand rehearses for off-Broadway play Driftwood with her fur-clad, demanding co-star Joan Rivers. Comedy drama written and directed by Sue Perkins, starring Katherine Ryan and Jessica Barden

programme.title: Opry Live
programme.sub-title: War and Treaty, John Carter Cash and Ana Cristina Cash, Ricky Skaggs and Sharon White, Band...
programme.desc: Featuring perfromances by the War and Treaty , John Carter Cash and Ana Cristina Cash, Ricky Skaggs and Sharon White, and the Band Perry

programme.title: St Vincent Plays Baloise Session
programme.desc: The singer-songwriter performs at the Swiss indoor festival in 2024, featuring Broken Man, Big Time Nothing, Candy Darling, New York, Sugarboy and All Born Screaming

programme.title: Greatest Albums Live
programme.desc: Peter Frampton takes to the stage at the Tucker Theatre in Murfreesboro, Tennessee, to play his hugely successful 1976 album Frampton Comes Alive!

programme.title: Discovering Music
programme.desc: Music experts explore the music of Jethro Tull, one of the most commercially successful and eccentric progressive-rock bands Britain has ever produced

programme.title: Pavarotti: The Duets - The Best of Pavarotti and Friends
programme.desc: A selection of Luciano Pavarottis collaborations, from opera with Cecilia Bartoli and Jose Carreras to pop duets with U2, Elton John and Mariah Carey

programme.title: Watercolour Challenge
programme.desc: Hannah Gordon hosts the art competition in which amateur watercolour painters compete against the clock and each other to capture a scene in just four hours

programme.title: Watercolour Challenge
programme.desc: Hannah Gordon hosts the art competition in which amateur watercolour painters compete against the clock and each other to capture a scene in just four hours

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A man invents a machine that enables him to talk to plants - with unexpected consequences. Harry Andrews stars

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.sub-title: Never Speak Ill of the Dead
programme.desc: Two friends suspect a doctor of murdering his wife and disposing of her body in a cellar. Starring Colin Blakely and Warren Clarke

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: An insurance investigator and his wife look into the case of Mrs Gillespie, who has been widowed twice and both times enjoyed windfall

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A former nurse learns that her husband has been seeing another woman when he goes away on business trips

programme.title: I Am Alfred Hitchcock (2021)
programme.desc: Interviews and archival footage weave together to tell the story of the Master of Suspense, one of the most influential and studied filmmakers in the history of cinema

programme.title: Whats New Pussycat? (1965)
programme.desc: A soon-to-be-married fashion editor worries hell find it hard to stay faithful and seeks psychiatric help. But his doctor has an agenda of his own, which leads to all manner of complications. Comedy, starring Peter OToole, Peter Sellers, Woody Allen, Ursula Andress and Romy Schneider

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: An accountant whose book-keeping is perfect finds his honesty being put to the test

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.sub-title: The Last Bottle in the World
programme.desc: A husband invites the man he suspects of being his wifes lover to dinner. Starring Anthony Quayle and Nigel Hawthorne

programme.title: Sparkling Cyanide (1983)
programme.desc: An amateur English sleuth on holiday in California becomes involved in the mystery surrounding the poisoning of a lawyer and his promiscuous wife during their anniversary celebrations - and faces the task of solving who among the many guests laced their hosts champagne. Agatha Christie whodunit, starring Anthony Andrews, Pamela Bellwood, Deborah Raffin, David Huffman and Harry Morgan

programme.title: Close to You: Remembering the Carpenters
programme.desc: Revealing portrait of the brother-and-sister duo who became one of the most successful pop acts of the 1970s, with songs including Yesterday Once More and Top of the World, before their career was cut short by Karen Carpenters death in 1983 at the age of 32

programme.title: Andre Rieu: Live in Malta
programme.desc: The violinist and his Johann Strauss Orchestra perform at the Granaries in Floriana, featuring a mix of romantic and lively music, including waltzes

programme.title: Andre Rieu: I Lost My Heart in Heidelberg
programme.desc: The Dutch violinist gives a spectacular musical tour of the German town, performing at a romantic ruined castle and on board a boat on the Neckar river

programme.title: Andre Rieu: Welcome to My World
programme.desc: The violinist reflects on the highlights of his concerts in Mexico, including the Platin Tenors performance of Granada

programme.title: Comedy Legends
programme.desc: Barry Cryer reflects on the life and career of American comedian Phyllis Diller, who was one of the first female comics to become a household name in the US

programme.title: Garbo: Where Did You Go?
programme.desc: A portrait of Hollywood icon Greta Garbo, exploring her fame, famous isolation and her decision to retire from acting. This documentary includes previously unseen archive footage, letters from Garbo, and re-enactments of her life. Narrated by Noomi Rapace

programme.title: Catching Fire: The Story of Anita Pallenberg (2023)
programme.desc: Documentary about the Italian actress and artist, who was known as the muse of the Rolling Stones, based on an autobiographical manuscript discovered by her children after her death in 2017. With readings by Scarlett Johansson

programme.title: Eric Ravilious - Drawn to War
programme.desc: A profile of the British war artist, who died on active service during the Second World War after establishing himself as a distinctive, prolific and successful painter

programme.title: Inside Art
programme.desc: A look at the breathtaking royal collection of art found in the state rooms at Buckingham Palace, with many pieces acquired and commissioned by George IV

programme.title: Riverdance 25th Anniversary Show
programme.desc: A brief look at the history of the show that brought Irish dancing to a worldwide audience, before a chance to see a full performance of it at Dublins 3Arena, filmed 25 years to the day after its debut at the same venue on February 9, 1995

programme.title: Watercolour Challenge
programme.desc: Hannah Gordon hosts the art competition in which amateur watercolour painters compete against the clock and each other to capture a scene in just four hours

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: News from Alcaras concerning Carries hideout throws suspicion on all the Irvines, while Brian begins to uncover a betrayal from Peter

programme.title: Heated Rivalry
programme.desc: Shane confirms Roses suspicions and admits he is gay, but they agree to remain friends. At the 2017 all-star game, Ilya and Shane reconnect and they play on the same team for the first time

programme.title: Heated Rivalry
programme.desc: Kip and his friends watch on TV as Scott discusses his public coming out while accepting the MVP award. Shane drives to his cottage with Ilya, who shares the trauma of his mothers death by suicide

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: Five years after the events in Salt Lake City, a now 19-year-old Ellie makes a discovery while on patrol with her best friend Dina. Back in Jackson Hole, Joel seeks help to mend his relationship with Ellie. The return of the post-apocalyptic drama, starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: Richard E Grant travels to Venice, said to be the city with the highest concentration of luxury hotels on the planet. He discovers how a measuring error led to the building of the citys biggest swimming pool, tries out a 15,000 euro-a-night royal suite whose bed has been slept in by everyone from the Beckhams to Prince Charles and the Duchess of Cornwall, and visits a hotel that keeps its doors open even when water floods to knee height. He also finds out why breaking a window once earned Ernest Hemingway a 10 per cent discount on his room

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Documentary following stately home owners who hire out their estates to earn extra income, and the clients who pay to use their properties for functions including stag parties, weddings and hunting trips. The programme explores how the reality of life in Britains grand houses is often less glamorous than it appears, as proprietors struggle to maintain crumbling buildings and pay utility bills, and examines the modern-day divide between domestic staff and their employers. Featuring life at Chillingham Castle, Maunsel House, Carlton Towers and Muncaster Castle

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Fitzalan Howard, the owners of Carlton Towers near Selby in North Yorkshire, prepare to host a fitness boot camp weekend at their property - while also welcoming an array of guests to celebrate their sons birthday. Meanwhile, Sir Benjamin Slade hopes a murder mystery weekend at Maunsel House in Somerset will help pay off a sizeable electricity bill

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming heads across the Irish Sea to Dublin, where he succumbs to the citys famous charm and meets some of its most fascinating characters. On a journey that takes in an 18th-century pleasure house and a burlesque life-painting class, Alan also stops off in Temple Bar for a pint with singer Sharon Corr, unlocks a mystery in Irelands oldest library and uncovers a stylish secret that lurks behind the steel shutters of an old lock-up

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Glasgow, one of his favourite cities, to reveal unusual and often hidden sights and sounds overlooked by the public. Starting at the Necropolis, he travels to the worlds oldest music hall before enjoying the views from a city-centre landmark. He also finds the time to take tea with a film star

programme.title: The Penguin
programme.desc: Sofia makes plans for a more hopeful future as she confronts the events that turned her into the Hangman and led to a decade-long fight to survive in Arkham State Hospital

programme.title: The Penguin
programme.desc: With his nascent operation at stake, Oz makes a desperate move to turn the tables, while Sofia strives to build a new legacy for herself

programme.title: The Penguin
programme.desc: Oz continues to expand his reach within the city with more suppliers than ever, and Victor is growing in confidence as his protege, despite fears he is being followed by someone connected to either Sofia or the Maronis. Sal and Sofia break into Ozs apartment in the hope of finding his weak spot

programme.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
programme.desc: On his journey to a forthcoming tournament in Ashford, Ser Duncan the Tall meets a clever young boy named Egg, who offers to be his squire. Fantasy prequel set a century before the events of Game of Thrones, starring Peter Claffey and Dexter Sol Ansell

programme.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
programme.desc: Dunk appeals to various lords in order to gain entrance into the tournament,.but Egg advises him to hold onto his pride. When the Targaryens arrive at Ashford, Dunk seizes his moment with Prince Baelor

programme.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
programme.desc: After Egg attempts to train Dunks stubborn horse, the knight teaches his new squire an important skill. As they take in the tourneys first full day of events, Dunk receives a proposition from the Ashford steward that could help secure his future

programme.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
programme.desc: After landing himself in the Targaryens crosshairs, Dunk exercises his right to request a trial by combat. However, Aerion insists on a trial of seven instead, so Dunk is faced with the daunting task of finding six others to fight alongside him

programme.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
programme.sub-title: In the Name of the Mother
programme.desc: Dunks mettle is put to the test in the brutal trial of seven, while a flashback reveals how he found himself drawn to the promise of a new future

programme.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
programme.desc: As Ashford mourns a great loss, Dunk considers his next move and decides whether to keep Egg as his squire. Peter Claffey and Dexter Sol Ansell star

programme.title: Under Salt Marsh
programme.desc: Former detective turned teacher Jackie Ellis discovers the body of 8-year-old pupil Cefin, seemingly drowned. The discovery sends shockwaves through the community, reviving the wounds of an unsolved case that rocked the town three years prior - the disappearance of Jackies niece Nessa, which cost her career. Crime drama, starring Kelly Reilly and Rafe Spall

programme.title: Under Salt Marsh
programme.desc: Old accusations resurface as Jackie and Bull must put aside years of mistrust before the towns tensions ignite into violence. Crime drama, starring Kelly Reilly and Rafe Spall

programme.title: Under Salt Marsh
programme.desc: When an illicit operation is uncovered, unrest spreads through the town. Jackie and Bull are forced into an uneasy alliance and share information while following separate leads. Jackie uncovers a lie at the heart of the investigation that tore her life apart three years ago, while Bull is forced to wrestle with his intimacy issues. Their fragile partnership is tested when Bull makes a horrifying new discovery

programme.title: Under Salt Marsh
programme.desc: Jackie struggles after her estranged sister returns and reignites years of guilt and betrayal, while Bull finds himself faced with two cases that are undeniably linked. A confession is made, but he suspects it has been designed to protect someone closer to home, while DNA evidence exposes a devastating truth and both Jackie and Bull must choose between protecting themselves or those they love

programme.title: Under Salt Marsh
programme.desc: Rising floodwater cuts Morfa Halen off from the world as another body is discovered. With the townspeople evacuating and the killer still at large, Bull closes in on the truth behind an illegal operation at the heart of all three cases. Jackie, acting alone, confronts a suspect with explosive consequences and a disappearance shocks the town

programme.title: Under Salt Marsh
programme.desc: In the midst of a violent storm, the residents of Morfa Halen form a search party. Jackie and Bull discover the horrifying truth behind the crimes that haunt the town. As Bull fights for his life and Jackie faces an unbearable choice, the storm reaches its peak and Morfas darkest secrets are laid bare

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: Floyd confronts Clark about the affair, while Plumb and Homer uncover new information about Carols past. Black comedy, starring David Harbour, Jason Bateman and Linda Cardellini

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: As the WLF makes a dangerous discovery, Ellie faces a key decision. An unlikely source shares a shocking truth

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: Joel surprises Ellie for her birthday, while as their rift continues to widen she prepares to confront him about her past, and Joel makes a difficult choice out on patrol

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: As a storm brews in the mountains, the residents of Jackson Hole prepare for the worst amid increased sightings of infected. Meanwhile, Abby weighs up her options

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: After Dina shares crucial intelligence information, Ellie prepares to petition the town council. Near Seattle, a religious group flees a war. Post-apocalyptic drama, starring Bella Ramsey

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: Floyds ego takes a hit after a failed attempt to reconnect with Carol, leading Clark to help his friend using the DTF app. Black comedy, starring David Harbour

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: In Seattle, Ellie and Dina find themselves amid a brutal battle between the zealous Seraphites and a ruthless militia

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Everyday life at Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, where the members of staff try to tactfully deal with the whims of their employer, baronet Humphry Wakefield, as the estate prepares to welcome a band of ghost-hunting tourists. Meanwhile, Carlton Towers in East Yorkshire hosts an annual dog show for Afghan hounds

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Fitzalan Howard try to impress American guests at Carlton Towers with a programme of traditional activities, including skinning rabbits and taking high tea. Meanwhile, Sir Humphry Wakefield entertains tourists on a wine-tasting weekend at Chillingham Castle

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor returns to explore more of the worlds most luxurious hotels and begins in Miamis South Beach, home to some of the most hedonistic and extravagant establishments in America. At the Fontainebleau, he meets a man with eye-opening stories about Frank Sinatras regular visits and gets a shock when he discovers how much it costs to hire a booth in the night club. Richard also gatecrashes swimwear fashion week at the Raleigh Hotel, where he speaks to the event manager about the many celebrity parties he has organised

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: In this edition the actor explores the luxury hotels of Hong Kong. Home to more skyscrapers than any other city, he first checks in to the Mandarin in the financial district, before experiencing the Four Seasons, the only hotel with two Michelin three-star resturants, as well as the timeless Peninsula in Kowloon, which even provides a Rolls-Royce airport taxi service. He ends his stay at the Ritz-Carlton, home to the worlds highest swimming pool

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor heads to Tokyo and checks out the Park Hyatt, the hotel featured in the film Lost in Translation, and goes behind the closed doors of the Japanese capitals love hotels. In the fashionable district of Meguro, Richard takes in the Claska, which was the citys first boutique hotel and has its own canine beauty salon

programme.title: The Penguin
programme.desc: Oz continues to expand his reach within the city with more suppliers than ever, and Victor is growing in confidence as his protege, despite fears he is being followed by someone connected to either Sofia or the Maronis. Sal and Sofia break into Ozs apartment in the hope of finding his weak spot

programme.title: The Penguin
programme.desc: Oz fights to preserve his family and his enterprise, while Sofia makes a shocking discovery. Crime drama, starring Colin Farrell and Cristin Milioti

programme.title: The Penguin
programme.desc: Truths are laid bare as Oz nears the end of his journey and his power struggle with Sofia comes to a head. Crime drama, with Colin Farrell and Cristin Milioti

programme.title: The Trip
programme.desc: Sequel to improvised comedy The Trip, with Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon once again playing versions of themselves. The two comedy actors are asked to embark on another round of restaurant reviews for a Sunday newspaper, this time in Italy. Steve is on hiatus from his American TV series and isnt drinking while Rob is looking to unwind with his time away from his young family. They begin their trip in Piedmont at the Trattoria Della Posta before stopping at the poet Byrons former house in Genoa on their way to the Cenobio dei Dogi in Camogli. Michael Winterbottom directs

programme.title: The Trip
programme.desc: Rob and Steve go on a boat trip, stopping off at the poet Shelleys house for a photo before continuing their journey and arriving at another restaurant. Rob goes for a walk on the beach with the woman running the excursion and asks how she ended up working on a boat in Italy, and confesses he is missing his young daughter. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon

programme.title: The Trip
programme.desc: Steve and Rob visit Viareggio in Tuscany, where the poet Shelleys body was washed ashore after he drowned, and have lunch at Trattoria Albana in Mazzolla. Later, Rob gets a phone call from his agent about a potential part in a film. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon

programme.title: The Trip
programme.desc: Steves assistant Emma joins him and Rob in Rome, where they also meet up with photographer Yolanda before visiting the Keats-Shelley Memorial House museum. They go on to their next restaurant, where Emma has a bit of news for them, and Rob and Steve compete with each other doing impressions of Marlon Brandos Don Corleone from The Godfather. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon

programme.title: The Trip
programme.desc: Steve and Rob visit Pompeii and then have lunch at Relais Blu on the Sorrento coast, overlooking the isle of Capri. Continuing their journey by car they head to the next hotel, where Rob receives a call from his agent telling him he has got the part in the movie he auditioned for. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon

programme.title: The Trip
programme.desc: Steves son Joe and his assistant Emma join him and Rob on the final leg of their culinary tour of Italy as they take the ferry from Naples to Capri, where they have lunch at Il Riccio. Afterwards, Rob asks Emma for advice about whether he should go back to Lucy, while Steve tells Joe he is going to buy a house closer to him. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: When Clark and Floyd learn that both their marriages have stalled, they begin to explore a new dating app for extramarital affairs. Black comedy, starring David Harbour, Jason Bateman and Linda Cardellini

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: After meeting at the cornhole party, Clark quickly hits it off with Floyds wife Carol. Later, detectives Homer and Plumb dig deeper into Clarks relationship with Carol, and Floyds time on the DTF app

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: When Detective Plumb discovers that Carol has lied about key details of her affair, she presses Homer to let her question Clark. Once in the hot seat, unsettling truths about Clarks relationships with both Floyd and Carol begin to come to light

programme.sub-title: Missouri Mutual Life and Health Insurance Company

programme.desc: Without a firm to work for and failing, Lorenzo fights to climb back up, but his private life has more surprises in store. Italian drama, starring Luca Argentero

programme.desc: Lewis and Crosetti expose a woman who has been marrying and then killing men to get her hands on their money. Crime drama, starring Daniel Baldwin

programme.desc: At Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, Sir Humphrey Wakefield prepares to hand over the estate to his apprehensive son Maximilian. Hard-working staff at Carlton Towers in North Yorkshire get ready for the arrival of 120 caravan owners for the annual rally and dinner dance

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor explores Berlin, visiting the arty Propeller Island City Lodge - a hotel where guests can fulfil their fantasies by sleeping in lion cages, coffins or rotating beds. programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets

A confession is made, but he suspects it has been designed to protect someone closer to home, while DNA evidence exposes a devastating truth and both Jackie and Bull must choose between protecting themselves or those they love

programme.title: Under Salt Marsh
programme.desc: Rising floodwater cuts Morfa Halen off from the world as another body is discovered. With the townspeople evacuating and the killer still at large, Bull closes in on the truth behind an illegal operation at the heart of all three cases. Jackie, acting alone, confronts a suspect with explosive consequences and a disappearance shocks the town

programme.title: Under Salt Marsh
programme.desc: In the midst of a violent storm, the residents of Morfa Halen form a search party. Jackie and Bull discover the horrifying truth behind the crimes that haunt the town. As Bull fights for his life and Jackie faces an unbearable choice, the storm reaches its peak and Morfas darkest secrets are laid bare

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: Floyd confronts Clark about the affair, while Plumb and Homer uncover new information about Carols past. Black comedy, starring David Harbour, Jason Bateman and Linda Cardellini

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: News from Alcaras concerning Carries hideout throws suspicion on all the Irvines, while Brian begins to uncover a betrayal from Peter

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: After Dina shares crucial intelligence information, Ellie prepares to petition the town council. Near Seattle, a religious group flees a war. Post-apocalyptic drama, starring Bella Ramsey

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: Floyds ego takes a hit after a failed attempt to reconnect with Carol, leading Clark to help his friend using the DTF app. Black comedy, starring David Harbour

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: In Seattle, Ellie and Dina find themselves amid a brutal battle between the zealous Seraphites and a ruthless militia

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Everyday life at Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, where the members of staff try to tactfully deal with the whims of their employer, baronet Humphry Wakefield, as the estate prepares to welcome a band of ghost-hunting tourists. Meanwhile, Carlton Towers in East Yorkshire hosts an annual dog show for Afghan hounds

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Fitzalan Howard try to impress American guests at Carlton Towers with a programme of traditional activities, including skinning rabbits and taking high tea. Meanwhile, Sir Humphry Wakefield entertains tourists on a wine-tasting weekend at Chillingham Castle

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor returns to explore more of the worlds most luxurious hotels and begins in Miamis South Beach, home to some of the most hedonistic and extravagant establishments in America. At the Fontainebleau, he meets a man with eye-opening stories about Frank Sinatras regular visits and gets a shock when he discovers how much it costs to hire a booth in the night club. Richard also gatecrashes swimwear fashion week at the Raleigh Hotel, where he speaks to the event manager about the many celebrity parties he has organised

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: In this edition the actor explores the luxury hotels of Hong Kong. Home to more skyscrapers than any other city, he first checks in to the Mandarin in the financial district, before experiencing the Four Seasons, the only hotel with two Michelin three-star resturants, as well as the timeless Peninsula in Kowloon, which even provides a Rolls-Royce airport taxi service. He ends his stay at the Ritz-Carlton, home to the worlds highest swimming pool

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor heads to Tokyo and checks out the Park Hyatt, the hotel featured in the film Lost in Translation, and goes behind the closed doors of the Japanese capitals love hotels. In the fashionable district of Meguro, Richard takes in the Claska, which was the citys first boutique hotel and has its own canine beauty salon

programme.title: The Penguin
programme.desc: Oz continues to expand his reach within the city with more suppliers than ever, and Victor is growing in confidence as his protege, despite fears he is being followed by someone connected to either Sofia or the Maronis. Sal and Sofia break into Ozs apartment in the hope of finding his weak spot

programme.title: The Penguin
programme.desc: Oz fights to preserve his family and his enterprise, while Sofia makes a shocking discovery. Crime drama, starring Colin Farrell and Cristin Milioti

programme.title: The Penguin
programme.desc: Truths are laid bare as Oz nears the end of his journey and his power struggle with Sofia comes to a head. Crime drama, with Colin Farrell and Cristin Milioti

programme.title: The Trip
programme.desc: Sequel to improvised comedy The Trip, with Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon once again playing versions of themselves. The two comedy actors are asked to embark on another round of restaurant reviews for a Sunday newspaper, this time in Italy. Steve is on hiatus from his American TV series and isnt drinking while Rob is looking to unwind with his time away from his young family. They begin their trip in Piedmont at the Trattoria Della Posta before stopping at the poet Byrons former house in Genoa on their way to the Cenobio dei Dogi in Camogli. Michael Winterbottom directs

programme.title: The Trip
programme.desc: Rob and Steve go on a boat trip, stopping off at the poet Shelleys house for a photo before continuing their journey and arriving at another restaurant. Rob goes for a walk on the beach with the woman running the excursion and asks how she ended up working on a boat in Italy, and confesses he is missing his young daughter. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon

programme.title: The Trip
programme.desc: Steve and Rob visit Viareggio in Tuscany, where the poet Shelleys body was washed ashore after he drowned, and have lunch at Trattoria Albana in Mazzolla. Later, Rob gets a phone call from his agent about a potential part in a film. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon

programme.title: The Trip
programme.desc: Steves assistant Emma joins him and Rob in Rome, where they also meet up with photographer Yolanda before visiting the Keats-Shelley Memorial House museum. They go on to their next restaurant, where Emma has a bit of news for them, and Rob and Steve compete with each other doing impressions of Marlon Brandos Don Corleone from The Godfather. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon

programme.title: The Trip
programme.desc: Steve and Rob visit Pompeii and then have lunch at Relais Blu on the Sorrento coast, overlooking the isle of Capri. Continuing their journey by car they head to the next hotel, where Rob receives a call from his agent telling him he has got the part in the movie he auditioned for. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon

programme.title: The Trip
programme.desc: Steves son Joe and his assistant Emma join him and Rob on the final leg of their culinary tour of Italy as they take the ferry from Naples to Capri, where they have lunch at Il Riccio. Afterwards, Rob asks Emma for advice about whether he should go back to Lucy, while Steve tells Joe he is going to buy a house closer to him. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: When Clark and Floyd learn that both their marriages have stalled, they begin to explore a new dating app for extramarital affairs. Black comedy, starring David Harbour, Jason Bateman and Linda Cardellini

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: After meeting at the cornhole party, Clark quickly hits it off with Floyds wife Carol. Later, detectives Homer and Plumb dig deeper into Clarks relationship with Carol, and Floyds time on the DTF app

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: When Detective Plumb discovers that Carol has lied about key details of her affair, she presses Homer to let her question Clark. Once in the hot seat, unsettling truths about Clarks relationships with both Floyd and Carol begin to come to light

programme.desc: The Irvines struggle to adjust to their new normal, while also recovering from the fallout of their arguments. As Marissa tries to cope with past events, Jenny deals with domestic pressures of her own and uncovers some of Richies secrets

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: As the WLF makes a dangerous discovery, Ellie faces a key decision. An unlikely source shares a shocking truth

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: Joel surprises Ellie for her birthday, while as their rift continues to widen she prepares to confront him about her past, and Joel makes a difficult choice out on patrol

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: King Viserys Targaryen hosts a tournament to celebrate the impending birth of his second child, while his daughter Rhaenyra welcomes her Uncle Daemon back to the Red Keep. First episode of the Game of Thrones prequel, starring Paddy Considine and Matt Smith

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: Amid the battle between Seattles warring factions, Ellies search draws her towards a devastating confrontation. Post-apocalyptic drama, starring Bella Ramsey

programme.title: Ligas
programme.desc: Brilliant and erratic defence attorney Lorenzon Ligas storms the courtroom to defend washed-up star Jack Zero, who is accused of murder. Italian drama, starring Luca Argentero and Marina Occhionero

programme.title: Ligas
programme.desc: Without a firm to work for and failing, Lorenzo fights to climb back up, but his private life has more surprises in store. Italian drama, starring Luca Argentero

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Lewis and Crosetti expose a woman who has been marrying and then killing men to get her hands on their money. Crime drama, starring Daniel Baldwin

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: At Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, Sir Humphrey Wakefield prepares to hand over the estate to his apprehensive son Maximilian. Hard-working staff at Carlton Towers in North Yorkshire get ready for the arrival of 120 caravan owners for the annual rally and dinner dance

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor explores Berlin, visiting the arty Propeller Island City Lodge - a hotel where guests can fulfil their fantasies by sleeping in lion cages, coffins or rotating beds. At the Schlosshotel in affluent Grunewald, cabaret dancer Romy Haag talks to Richard about her affair with David Bowie, who stayed at the hotel while living in the German capital in the 1970s

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor heads to New Orleans and meets soul singer Irma Thomas at the Hotel de Monteleone, an establishment that was popular with writers such as Tennessee Williams, F Scott Fitzgerald and Ernest Hemingway. Richard speaks to Steel Magnolias author Robert Harling about the Soniat House, check into the supposedly haunted Hotel Maison de Ville and talks to burlesque dancer Chrissy Owens at the Roosevelt

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Lewis and Crosetti expose a woman who has been marrying and then killing men to get her hands on their money. Crime drama, starring Daniel Baldwin

programme.title: Flavia (2025)
programme.desc: Flavia de Luce, an 11-year-old amateur sleuth, investigates a murder at her familys manor house when her father falls under suspicion. Family adventure, starring Molly Belle Wright, Martin Freeman, Jonathan Pryce and Toby Jones

programme.title: Pokemon: Detective Pikachu (2019)
programme.desc: Student Tim Goodman sets out to find his missing detective father by teaming up with a wise-cracking talking Pikachu that his dad, Harry, used to own. With help from reporter Lucy and her Psyduck, they attempt to track him down before time runs out. Fantasy adventure, starring Justice Smith and the voice of Ryan Reynolds, with Kathryn Newton, Ken Watanabe and Bill Nighy

programme.title: Ready Player One (2018)
programme.desc: In 2045, gamers explore a virtual world in the quest for a deceased tycoons fortune. However, they must also contend with an evil corporation who will stop at nothing to get their hands on the prize. Steven Spielbergs fantasy adventure based on Ernest Clines novel, starring Tye Sheridan, Olivia Cooke, Ben Mendelsohn, Simon Pegg and Mark Rylance

programme.title: Paddington (2014)
programme.desc: An earthquake forces a bear from the Peruvian jungle to start a new life in London. He finds modern Britain to be very different from the stories told to him by his aunt, but makes a new home with a kindly family. However, a sinister taxidermist intends to turn him into a museum exhibit. Comedy based on Michael Bonds series of childrens books, starring Hugh Bonneville, Sally Hawkins and Nicole Kidman, with the voice of Ben Whishaw

programme.title: Paddington 2 (2017)
programme.desc: The lovable little bear has settled into his new life with the Brown family in London, becoming a much-loved member of the local community - until his search for a birthday present for his aunt leads to him being framed as a thief. While the Browns try to clear Paddingtons name, he tries to make himself at home in prison, winning over the other convicts and getting involved in an escape attempt. Comedy adventure, starring Hugh Bonneville, Hugh Grant and Sally Hawkins, with Ben Whishaw providing the voice of Paddington

programme.title: Paddington in Peru (2024)
programme.desc: The lovable bear, with the Brown family in tow, returns to Peru to visit his Aunt Lucy, embarking on a mysterious adventure. Comedy adventure, starring Hugh Bonneville, Emily Mortimer, Antonio Banderas, Olivia Colman and Julie Walters, with Ben Whishaw providing the voice of Paddington

programme.title: Wonder Woman (2017)
programme.desc: An Amazon princess who grows up in enchanted realm has her first encounter with the outside world during the First World War. American airman Steve Trevor crash lands on her isolated island home. Determined to bring the chaos sweeping the world to an end, she ventures onto the front line in an attempt to bring down an ancient and powerful evil force that is driving the human race towards destruction. Director Patty Jenkins blockbusting fantasy adventure, starring Gal Gadot, Chris Pine and David Thewlis

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home (2021)
programme.desc: With the web-slingers identity now revealed to the world, Peter Parker asks Doctor Strange for magical help to undo the damage. However, a spell gone wrong unleashes dangerous foes from parallel universes on the world. Comic-book adventure sequel, starring Tom Holland, Zendaya and Benedict Cumberbatch, with Willem Dafoe, Jamie Foxx and Alfred Molina among the stars of past Spider-Man movies reprising their roles

programme.title: The Mummy Returns (2001)
programme.desc: Married explorers Rick and Evelyn battle the newly resurrected mummy Imhotep and his ruthless partner, who have captured their son. The undead creature is heading for a confrontation with a legendary ancient warrior - with power over a magical army to be won. Fantasy adventure sequel, starring Brendan Fraser, Rachel Weisz, John Hannah, Arnold Vosloo, Oded Fehr and Patricia Velasquez, with a brief appearance by Dwayne Johnson

programme.title: Pacific Rim (2013)
programme.desc: A rift between dimensions opens up at the bottom of the Pacific ocean, and Earth is invaded by gigantic alien monsters. Equally massive robots, each controlled by two human pilots with their minds linked, are created to fight back against the creatures. Sci-fi adventure, starring Charlie Hunnam, Rinko Kikuchi and Idris Elba

Fantasy action adventure, starring Brendan Fraser, Rachel Weisz, John Hannah, Arnold Vosloo and Oded Fehr

programme.desc: Agent J investigates the unauthorised landing of a spacecraft and discovers a malevolent alien disguised as a lingerie model is on the verge of destroying humanity. His only hope of stopping her diabolical plot is to restore the memory of his retired partner K - but his former mentor takes more than a little convincing. Sci-fi comedy sequel, directed by Barry Sonnenfeld, starring Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones, Rosario Dawson, Lara Flynn Boyle, Johnny Knoxville, Rip Torn and Tony Shalhoub

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park (1997)
programme.desc: Scientist Dr Ian Malcolm reluctantly joins a research team on the island where his employer first designed genetically engineered dinosaurs. Meanwhile, a big-game hunter takes the chance to bag the biggest prize of all - a Tyrannosaurus rex. Steven Spielbergs dinosaur adventure sequel, starring Jeff Goldblum, Julianne Moore, Pete Postlethwaite and Richard Attenborough

programme.title: The Golden Compass (2007)
programme.desc: Orphan Lyra Belacqua lives in a parallel universe populated by magical and menacing characters. When her best friend becomes the latest in a long line of children to mysteriously vanish, she embarks on a perilous mission to uncover the dark secret behind their disappearance. Fantasy adventure based on Philip Pullmans novel Northern Lights, starring Dakota Blue Richards, Nicole Kidman, Daniel Craig and Eva Green. Featuring the voices of Ian McKellen, Kristin Scott Thomas and Kathy Bates

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade (1989)
programme.desc: The intrepid archaeologist sets out to find his estranged father, who has gone missing while searching for the Holy Grail. Once reunited, the duo team up to finish the task and locate the sacred relic before the Nazis get their hands on it. Action adventure sequel directed by Steven Spielberg, the third instalment in the successful franchise. Harrison Ford stars, alongside Sean Connery, Alison Doody, River Phoenix, Julian Glover and Denholm Elliott

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark (1981)
programme.desc: Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones goes in search of the legendary Ark of the Covenant, a biblical artefact of devastating power. His quest leads him to Egypt, where the Nazis are plotting to use the Ark to further Hitlers plans for world domination - aided by Joness deceitful French rival. The first of five big-screen action adventures, starring Harrison Ford as Indy, with Karen Allen, Paul Freeman and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: On Swift Horses (2025)
programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. Back in their hotel room, Julius and Henry fantasise about using the same underhand tactics as card sharps to line their pockets. Drama, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Jacob Elordi and Will Poulter

programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, he scrambles to find her as both battle the consequences of their pasts. Paul Thomas Andersons action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Sean Penn and Benicio del Toro

programme.title: Materialists (2025)
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a clients wedding, Lucy meets the grooms brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Songs romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal

programme.desc: Documentary following an American football team from an underprivileged Memphis high school. programme.title: Stasi FC
programme.desc: Tracing a decade of football, this documentary tells the story of the East German secret services control of BFC Dynamo, a tale of betrayal, murder and manipulation

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: The life and career of the American actress, who rose to fame in Ridley Scotts Alien and was nominated for an Acacdemy Award when she reprised her role in Aliens in 1986

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: The life and work of Steven Soderbergh, whose films include Sex, Lies, and Videotape, Out of Sight, Erin Brockovich, and Traffic, for which he won an Academy Award

programme.title: Laurel and Hardy: Their Lives and Magic
programme.desc: Documentary shedding new light on the turbulent private lives of Stan Laurel and Oliver Hardy and the genuine friendship between them

programme.title: Elvis Presley: The Searcher
programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary about the singer, beginning with his early life in Tupelo, Mississippi, and his unprecedented rise to fame over a single year

programme.title: Elvis Presley: The Searcher
programme.desc: Conclusion of the documentary about the singer, beginning with his return home after his discharge from the army, and how he dealt with a rapidly changing pop scene

programme.title: I Am Patrick Swayze
programme.desc: A tribute to the American actor, known for his roles in hits like Dirty Dancing, Ghost and The Outsiders. With contributions by Demi Moore and Rob Lowe among others

programme.title: Becoming Madonna
programme.desc: Documentary charting the singers rise to stardom, built around a cache of recently uncovered audio tapes in which a young Madonna reflects on her extraordinary life and career. Plus, rare footage, unseen photos and interviews with family, friends and collaborators

programme.title: Salt Path: A Very British Scandal
programme.desc: A look at Observer journalist Chloe Hadjimatheous investigation into allegations of factual inaccuracies in Raynor Winns book The Salt Path

programme.title: The Wimbledon Kidnapping
programme.desc: A look back at the mysterious disappearance of Muriel McKay in Wimbledon in 1969, as well as the trial of the first kidnap and ransom case in Britain

programme.title: Queen of Speed
programme.desc: A look at the career of French driver Michele Mouton, charting her battle to rise to the top of the male-dominated world of rallying in the 1970s and 80s

programme.title: The Fog of War (2003)
programme.desc: Former US Secretary of Defense Robert McNamara looks back over his career, explaining why, after initially supporting the decision to go to war in Vietnam, he eventually chose to speak out against the conflict - a decision that cost him his position. Documentary by acclaimed film-maker Errol Morris

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: The life and work of American film-maker Richard Linklater, whose films include the Before trilogy, School of Rock, Me and Orson Welles, A Scanner Darkly and Boyhood

programme.title: Rolling Stone: Stories from the Edge
programme.desc: Charting the history of the magazine founded in San Francisco in 1967 by Jann Wenner and Ralph J Gleason that mixed music coverage with innovative political reporting

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of the English actor, best-known for his roles in Love Actually, Notting Hill and Four Weddings and a Funeral

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: The life and work of Australian film-maker Phillip Noyce, who directed movies including Dead Calm, Patriot Games, Rabbit-Proof Fence and The Quiet American

programme.title: Stevie Van Zandt: Disciple
programme.desc: Tracing the musician and actors career, including his work as a member of Bruce Springsteens E Street Band and his role as Silvio Dante in The Sopranos

programme.title: My Icon
programme.desc: The football coach talks about her idols

programme.title: JFK Revisited: Through the Looking Glass (2021)
programme.desc: Oliver Stones documentary examining the assassination of US president John F Kennedy, using James DiEugenios 1992 book Destiny Betrayed: JFK, Cuba and the Garrison Case, and recently declassified US government files to shine a light on what happened in Dallas on November 22, 1963. Narrated by Whoopi Goldberg and Donald Sutherland

programme.title: I Am Jackie O (2020)
programme.desc: Profile of Jackie Kennedy Onassis, providing a definitive exploration of her life, from first lady to widow, unofficial royalty and fashion icon

programme.title: Boyzone: No Matter What

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones heads to the south-east of England to explore the turbulent history of Dover Castle. He reveals that Henry II ordered its construction not only as a statement of royal power, but also out of guilt for the murder of Thomas Becket, the Archbishop of Canterbury, in 1170. Dan discovers how a vast network of tunnels was used to defend the castle, including underground barracks built during the Napoleonic Wars and a nuclear bunker created during the Cold War

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the turbulent history of the Tower of London, which is one of Britains most famous buildings and has been a military fortress, a palace, a royal mint, a prison, a zoo and a place of execution. He reveals how one kings obsession with money led to the Tower becoming the focus of the worst Jewish massacre the country had ever seen and explains how a mob of disgruntled peasants managed to break through its defences as they sought bloody revenge for taxes they could no longer put up with

programme.title: Historys Greatest Mysteries

programme.title: Titanic: A Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: As the Titanic started to sink in April 1912, another ship came into view, offering her passengers the hope of being rescued. However, despite a fusillade of rockets, the ship turned away. Within two hours, 1,500 people were dead. An American investigation at the time accused the SS Californian, even though the freighter was stationary that night. A British inquiry concurred, keen to shift blame from national failures on lifeboat provision and steamship supervision. However, since Titanics wreck was discovered, the mystery began to unlock, and now, with recently discovered clues, a new suspect has emerged: the SS Mount Temple. This documentary follows a range of experts, using the latest investigative tools, as they examine these new clues and revisit the evidence from 1912 to take a fresh look at the cold case of the 20th century

programme.title: Titanic: Mystery Solved
programme.desc: Documentary in which experts examine previously undiscovered evidence of flaws in the Titanics design that may have contributed to the ship sinking in April 1912

programme.desc: Lisa, Scooter and company driver Muskie Todd team up as a three-truck convoy to take on the notorious Asheweig Road. The trio must work together to survive a looming disaster. Meanwhile, across the wilderness, IRT veteran Todd Dewey takes on a route hes never seen before - forcing him out of his truck and into a fight against the elements

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The Muskie Creek convoy struggles to recover from disaster after an ice bridge collapses beneath Lisas truck, tipping her off the road. Scooter launches an unorthodox plan to get them back on track, while Todd races out of the wilderness on a deadline

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits the south of England, discovering Britains oldest shoe through a popular form of archaeology - mud larking. While in Kent, Alice visits a dig where one of the largest and oldest stone hand axes in the UK has been uncovered. Another archaeological dig reveals Henry Vs lost shipyard on the south coast, and in Dover, Alice learns about top-secret Second World War defences from Jon Barker as he investigates the formerly classified weapons as well as the site where they were found at

programme.title: The Last Hunt for Nazi Gold
programme.desc: Guy and Justine follow Amber Room rumours from castles to caves before meeting a miner whose strange tunnel network takes the search to new extremes

programme.title: Secret Sex Lives of Tyrants
programme.desc: Examining the secretive system of control behind Gaddafis regime, showing how fear and exploitation were woven into his rule

programme.title: Hitlers Secret Sex Life
programme.desc: The myriad of rumours, theories and disputed historical accounts of Adolf Hitlers sexual psychology, considering how it integrated into his overall twisted psyche. This series addresses various time periods of Hitlers alleged and proven sex life and explores the role sex played in shaping Hitlers behaviour

programme.title: Shipwrecks: When History Resurfaces
programme.desc: Kevin Sempe recalls the events of 1992, when a deadly cloud of steam and ash churned through plantations and villages, flattening the grand city of St Pierre, in Martinique. It then thundered into the bay where it sank 18 ships and hundreds of smaller craft. Within a minute or two, nearly 32,000 people died

programme.title: Shipwrecks: When History Resurfaces
programme.sub-title: The True Story of the Pirates of the Caribbean
programme.desc: Off the coast of the Dominican Republic lies a marine cemetery with more than a hundred wrecks. Alongside archaeologists and specialists, Kevin Sempe dives into the waters of the Caribbean to find the relics that litter the sea floor from piracys heyday in the region. He discovers wrecks of pirates, freebooters and galleons

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Lisa Kelly tackles the longest run of the season so far, but disaster strikes when a fire breaks out beneath her truck - while she hauls barrels of explosive oil, and a fire erupts beneath her truck during a perilous, long run on the ice roads, showcasing the extreme dangers of her job. Todd Dewey returns to face an old nemesis that once defeated him and destroyed his truck - Asheweig Road

programme.desc: A seller whips into the shop with an energy dome hat made for the band DEVO. Corey takes a shot at a decanter set that supposedly belonged to Buffalo Bill. Meanwhile, Chum teams up with new employee Santos, to check out a vintage pinball game

programme.title: The Great British Dig: History in Your Back Garden
programme.desc: Hugh Dennis and a team of archaeologists and historians descend on a suburban road in Kent where they believe a Roman settlement is hidden beneath the back gardens. With just one week to discover the history that may lie below the terraced houses of Florence Road, Maidstone, Hugh goes door-to-door to recruit willing locals to help Richard Taylor, Chloe Duckworth and Simon Elliott dig up their gardens in the search for remains

programme.title: Deadmans Curse
programme.desc: Legend hunter and mountaineer Adam Palmer leads a bid to finally solve the mystery of Slumachs lost gold mine, amid the rugged terrain of the Pacific Northwest. With little to go on, its up to Palmer to find the path forward and guide the team through the uncharted terrain of Corbold Canyon. As clues in Jacksons deathbed letter and landmarks on the map line up, a recurring marker points to a new theory at the heart of the legend

programme.title: The Simpsons
