programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Hard-hearted Mr Burns decides to deny his employees any more free medication, prompting Homer to whisk Grampa away on a drug-smuggling mission to Canada. Unfortunately, the duo fall foul of the authorities on their return journey

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer develops a knack for cooking and challenges Marge to a baking contest. Determined to win at any cost, she resorts to cheating in a bid to avoid humiliation. Meanwhile, Bart holds a Playdude party attended by Hollywood veteran James Caan

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer comes up with the bright idea of making money by selling used grease, and ropes Bart in to help, while Lisa tries to join a popular new classmates social clique. Featuring the guest voice of Lisa Kudrow

programme.desc: A look at outstanding films from the genre

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey (2012)
programme.desc: Unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins is pulled out of his comfortable life when Gandalf the wizard volunteers him for a dangerous quest. He joins a party of dwarves who are on a mission to reclaim their lost homeland, which has been taken over by a dragon. When the group journeys into the Misty Mountains, Bilbo becomes separated from the dwarves and falls into a cave, where he finds himself confronted by Gollum and forced to play a riddle game. It is set in Middle-earth 60 years before the events of The Lord of the Rings and is the first part of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage, James Nesbitt, Ken Stott, Cate Blanchett, Ian Holm and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug (2013)
programme.desc: The party of dwarves and their hobbit ally continue the quest to reclaim their lost kingdom, journeying through the forest home of ancestral enemy the elves and finally facing the dragon that drove them from their home. Meanwhile, Gandalf the wizard investigates the rise of Necromancer, a mysterious dark power residing in Dol Guldur with the ability to summon the spirits of the dead. Part two of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage and Orlando Bloom, with Luke Evans, Evangeline Lilly and Benedict Cumberbatch

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies (2014)
programme.desc: Dwarf king Thorin reclaims control of his homeland, but his descent into madness places him on the brink of war with his human and elven allies. As Thorins Hobbit friend Bilbo tries to save the tormented ruler from himself, a vast horde of orcs gathers to destroy them all. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Martin Freeman, Richard Armitage, Ian McKellen, Luke Evans and Orlando Bloom

programme.sub-title: Mvp Boxing: Caroline Dubois V Terri Harper
programme.desc: Caroline Dubois v Terri Harper. Coverage of the bout for the WBC and WBO World Lightweight titles at Olympia London. Dubois is undefeated in her 13 professional bouts to date and stopped Camilla Panatta last time out in a defence of the WBC belt Miami. However, she faces arguably her toughest test to date against Harper, who won the WBO strap against Rhiannon Dixon after dropping back down to this weight class and defended it against another previously unbeaten prospect in Natalie Zimmermann

programme.title: Rewilding

programme.title: Rewilding
programme.desc: A visit to Steinhuder Meer, a biodiversity hotspot in Germany, a combination of fenlands, alder march and dunes which create an amazing landscape

programme.title: Rewilding
programme.desc: Andalucia consists of extreme habitats once severely impacted by humans. Now, many previously near-extinct animals are reclaiming this unique land

programme.title: Animal Empires
programme.desc: A look at what happens when domestic and farm animals escape to the wild. After years of being cared for, suddenly they face a race to learn the skills needed for survival

programme.title: Animal Empires
programme.desc: Finding a home in new territory is a challenge, but sometimes animals have no choice. Using sheer numbers to impose their will, these are natures unwanted guests

programme.title: Becoming Elephant: The Orphans of Reteti
programme.desc: Following the journey of orphaned elephants at Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, the first community-owned and operated elephant sanctuary in Africa

programme.title: Becoming Elephant: The Orphans of Reteti

programme.title: Africas Claws and Jaws
programme.desc: Documentary revealing the weapons at the disposal of Africas predators, who never know where the next meal will come from, but must be prepared to find it

programme.title: Africas Claws and Jaws
programme.desc: Snakes, spiders and scorpions are the kind of creepy crawlies many fear the most. In Africa, these species are refined predators

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Its dental day for squirrel monkey Logan, but an all-over health check reveals another issue. While young female orangutan Mimi meets alpha male Tuan for the first time and Alison visits a group of lemurs soon to be rehomed at the park

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison collects four male lemurs being rehomed at the park while baby orangutans Sibu and Kiwi enjoy a play session together.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: In Vietnam, black-shanked douc Peter is fitted with a GPS collar before being released into the wild with his group. While in Dorset gibbons Kim and Tien are on the move to a temporary home and theres juicy melons for the spider monkeys

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Disabled chimp Chocolate has a new friend and everyones surprised by just who wants to be her pal. Orangutan babies Kiwi and Sibu try out their restyled playroom and a wooden puzzle for the woollies provides a great work out.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Diabetic golden-cheeked gibbon Alex needs dental treatment, but the operation is complicated by her condition, and chimpanzee Eddi sends a wild intruder packing

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Newly arrived lemur Ben meets boss lady Fennel and conducts himself accordingly while baby orangutans Kiwi and Sibu explore a tunnel full of browse.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Following his visit to the Great Barrier Reef in 1957, naturalist and broadcaster David Attenborough returns and uses the latest filming techniques to unlock the secrets of the natural wonder. In the first edition, he descends beneath the waves at night and uses cutting-edge technology to generate computer scans of the sea floor. He also learns about a complex community of animals, as well as the annual coral spawning, which is responsible for the great diversity in the reef

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Using the latest technology, the naturalist explores the shark-infested waters of Osprey Reef in the Triton submersible, before returning to the nesting grounds of the Green Sea Turtle, 60 years after his first visit to Raine Island. He also marvels at manta ray cleaning stations on Lady Elliot Island, and tracks dwarf minke whales to discover their surprising reasons for returning, and why the reef is vital for their survival

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The naturalist examines what the next few decades may hold for this remarkable ecosystem, and looks at the work of scientists who are trying to preserve the area and the species that inhabit it, assisted by research vessel the Alucia. He also embarks on an ambitious attempt to dive further into the reef than ever before to witness the resilient coral that live down in the depths and see if they hold answers that may help to overcome challenges that lie ahead, as the impact of humans on the reef continues to take its toll

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: A look at Australias Wild West - The Kimberley - the animals who live there and tracking the quests of those working to protect them. Cameras follow wallabies, koolamana lizards and crocodile hatchlings as they face the wild rivers dangers and discover the true power of this waterway

programme.desc: Felines and canids clash across the world. This edition dives into direct battles and strategies to steal food. Intelligence and strength decide who reigns in each territory

programme.title: Shark with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Naturalist and shark expert Steve Backshall celebrates the dazzling diversity of sharks, uncovering their secret lives and the threats they face. He begins by exploring the radical variety of sharks in the Atlantic Ocean and marks the start of a global journey in the so-called shark capital of the world, the Bahamas

programme.title: Shark with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: The naturalist learns about the sharks of the Indian Ocean, which despite finding ways to adapt to the environment, face threats from climate change, pollution and overfishing

programme.title: Shark with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: The naturalist joins scientists to find the shark hotspots in the Pacific Ocean, where their precious locations are under threat and numbers are plummeting. Steve learns what the sharks offer that is so important to the Pacific and what can be done to preserve them

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: A look at Australias Wild West - The Kimberley - the animals who live there and tracking the quests of those working to protect them. programme.title: Ocean Parks
programme.desc: Profiles of the worlds most spectacular marine habitats, beginning with the Caribbean island of Bonaire, a leading destination for eco-tourists

programme.title: Islands
programme.desc: An exploration of the wildlife on Baffin in the Canadian Arctic, encountering arctic foxes, white beluga whales, a never-before-filmed two-tusked narwhal and more

programme.title: Islands
programme.desc: A look at the ecosystem of Borneo, the diversity of which is threatened by the actions of humans and where the wildlife has been forced to learn new ways to survive

programme.title: Osprey
programme.desc: When a veteran pair of osprey return home, they must take on enemies, elements and hundreds of fish if they wish to raise the next generation

programme.title: Wild Crusades
programme.desc: A team of wildlife filmmakers explore the forests of Yala National Park as they investigate the enigmatic sloth bears life and behaviour

programme.title: Wild Crusades
programme.desc: A sick elephant calf who was found abandoned near a reserve appears to be another victim of the battle for space between humans and elephants

programme.title: Baby Animals
programme.desc: Even giant animals start out small, and the likes of elephants, gorillas, rhinos and bison have some of the cutest babies in the animal kingdom

programme.title: Baby Animals
programme.desc: Most animals are born defenceless, but under the protection and guidance of their mothers, they soon become masters of their own universes

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Documentary following daily life at Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre in Dorset, where staff look after monkeys, chimps, orangutans and other primates

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Documentary following daily life at Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre in Dorset, where staff look after monkeys, chimps, orangutans and other primates

programme.title: Big Cats: An Amazing Animal Family
programme.desc: Part one of two. Biologist Patrick Aryee explores how cats have evolved throughout the millennia, learning to thrive in inhospitable environments, as well as becoming the worlds most popular pet. In the first edition there is spectacular footage of caracals jumping three metres to catch flying birds, and a rare Bornean bay cat, which was thought to have been extinct. Patrick finds out how tigers made the transition from South-east Asias steamy jungles to the -40C temperatures of Siberia, and meets lion whisperer Kevin Richardson

programme.title: Big Cats: An Amazing Animal Family
programme.desc: Patrick Aryee concludes his two-part exploration of the feline family tree, revealing how the Canadian lynx learned to thrive in the snow and spread out, evolving and inhabiting new parts of the Americas. In Belize, he mounts an experiment that showcases the margays supersharp senses and gravity-defying acrobatics, and heads to the training track with a cheetah to find out what speed it is capable of. Finally, Patrick tells the story of the cats domestication in Essaouira, Morocco, believed to be one of the first places where one particular species first gave up life in the wild in return for food, warmth, security and a home

programme.title: Worlds Most Toxic Animals
programme.desc: First of two programmes about some of earths most dangerous creatures, which lurk in the oceans, the forests, swamps and deserts. In Australia, meet the worlds most venomous snake, and in nearby oceans, discover the deadly nature of the marine creatures that share these tropical waters

programme.title: Worlds Most Toxic Animals
programme.desc: Exploring more of earths dangerous creatures, beginning in the South American rainforest with the poison-packed golden dart frog, which harbours enough poison to kill 10 men. Plus, a visit to Sydney, Australia, home of the worlds most venomous spider

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Geoffroys marmoset males Cesar and Gizmo could soon have female partners, but first, a minor operation is required. Theres new living arrangements for the saki and squirrel monkeys and a sticky challenge for the nursery orangutans

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison collects Angel, a marmoset in need of a new home and partner. A move to Malagasy for the new male lemurs and the old guard causes a bit of a stink. While woolly monkey mum Eva and baby Xuri enjoy some icy treats

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The next stage of lemur introductions keeps the primate care staff on their toes, while gibbons Kim and Tien head back to their familiar stomping ground. Tuans orangutans keep it cool with giant ice lollies

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: In Dao Tien a group of misbehaving doucs need to be relocated and female golden-cheeked gibbon Tungs release is hampered by the weather. While rain doesnt stop gibbons Kim and Tien going out into their tree filled enclosure.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Concerns for chimp Jestah who has a lump on his jaw. Lemurs Fennel and Ben trial life with the guenons but youngster Biff proves a bit full on

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The large playroom at the orangutan nursery is a hit with youngsters Kiwi and Sibu, while chimp Clin gets a manicure for safety rather than appearance.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Theres a tasty treat of corn for the chimps, but Bart and his troop miss out and the new lemur boys get to experience life in the trees at Malagasy

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Orangutan Amy becomes a great-grandmother as Awan and Jin welcome a baby boy. While theres more baby news for the newly released doucs and gibbons in Vietnam. Theres an emotional milestone in the life of disabled chimp Chocolate.

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough employs the latest technologies to explore the violence, rivalries and deadly weaponry existing within the world of bugs. This first episode examines the survival tactics of its terrifying residents including killer ants, trap-setting spiders and beetles with the ability to shoot boiling chemicals at their enemies

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster continues his bug-eyed view of the world of creepy-crawlies, revealing how predators defuse the defences of their prey. Highlights include the cockroach wasp, busy preparing a tasty - and very live - treat for its young, the whirligig beetle, which employs a water-based radar system, and the jumping portia spider, which feeds on other arachnids

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A further selection of creepy-crawly close-ups, focusing on courtship in the bug world. Highlights include scorpions shaking their booty, the perfume-wearing nasonia wasp and the tropical cricket, for whom romance goes out of the window as it uses bribery to seal the deal with would-be partners. One potential partner to steer well clear of, however, is the praying mantis, the female of which is notorious for eating the male just after - or even during - mating. Narrated by David Attenborough

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A close-up view of sex, bug-style, as David Attenborough talks viewers through the different ways in which creepy-crawlies reproduce. Size matters for the minuscule male orb spider, creepily sneaking up on its intended and trying to mate without her noticing, while theres no rest for the lothario-like butterfly, which has plenty of notches on its proverbial bedpost. However, the harvestman spider has no use for sex at all, and reproduces by cloning itself

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough shifts the focus to bugs that prefer co-operation rather than conflict. They include burrowing cockroaches, the suitably named social spiders - which share a 30-metre web - the queen bee and her happy hive of workers and green ants pulling together to build a nest

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster concludes his close-up examination of the creepy-crawly world, shifting focus to the bugs ultimate invention - the colony. Key residents of these minuscule mega-cities include honey bees, termites, leafcutter ants - who have a knack for farming - and their Argentine cousins, members of a community so vast it spans an entire continent

programme.title: Matsalu Moose: Wild Giants of the Baltics
programme.desc: Matsalu National Park at the Baltic Sea is known for being one of Europes most important stopover places for migrating birds. However, few know that an exceptionally large moose colony also lives here. This documentary follows the moose through the eyes of two yearlings as they are chased away from their mother before she gives birth to the next calf

programme.title: Kingdom of the Tide
programme.desc: Documentary taking a look at the intertidal zone, the point at which the ocean meets the land, and the struggle for survival facing the creatures that inhabit this realm. Their success is critical, because this is one of the most important habitats on the planet - a vital connection between worlds

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: Documentary revealing the secrets and ingenious tactics of natures toughest fighters in their battles for survival. Narrated by Sean Bean

programme.title: The Scorpion King (2002)
programme.desc: A ruthless warlord resolves to rid the desert of its few remaining tribes, prompting them to seek the help of a legendary assassin to end the despots reign of terror by destroying his source of power - a beautiful but deadly sorceress. Fantasy action adventure, starring Dwayne Johnson, Steven Brand, Kelly Hu and Michael Clarke Duncan

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull (2008)
programme.desc: The globe-trotting archaeologist teams up with a rebellious teenager who draws him into a search in the Amazon jungle for a mysterious artefact of untold power. But their quest is hindered by Soviet agents who also want the fabled object for a more sinister purpose. Action adventure sequel, starring Harrison Ford, Cate Blanchett, Shia LaBeouf, Ray Winstone and John Hurt

programme.title: The Mummy (1999)
programme.desc: A soldier of fortune joins an academic and her conniving brother on an expedition to an ancient Egyptian lost city. The explorers accidentally cause the spirit of a vengeful priest with awe-inspiring supernatural powers to rise from his tomb, leading to a desperate battle for survival. Fantasy action adventure, starring Brendan Fraser, Rachel Weisz, John Hannah, Arnold Vosloo and Oded Fehr

programme.title: Spy Kids (2001)
programme.desc: A megalomaniac threatens to take over the world, so two married spies come out of retirement to thwart his plans. However, when they go missing, it is up to their plucky children to step in and save the day. Family adventure directed by Robert Rodriguez, starring Antonio Banderas, Carla Gugino, Alan Cumming, Alexa Vega and Daryl Sabara

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: Island of Lost Dreams (2002)
programme.desc: The pint-sized secret agents investigate a mad scientist who has meddled with powerful forces and created a host of bizarre mutant animals. However, the villain is not the only problem they have to face, as another pair of youngsters are determined to outshine them. Family adventure sequel, starring Antonio Banderas, Steve Buscemi and Carla Gugino

programme.title: Spy Kids 3-D: Game Over (2003)
programme.desc: Young agent Juni has to go it alone when his big sister Carmen is kidnapped by the evil Toymaker, forcing the plucky junior spy to infiltrate the villains virtual reality world to rescue her. Adventure sequel, starring Daryl Sabara, Alexa Vega, Sylvester Stallone, Antonio Banderas, Ricardo Montalban, George Clooney, Steve Buscemi, Salma Hayek and Elijah Wood

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark (1981)
programme.desc: Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones goes in search of the legendary Ark of the Covenant, a biblical artefact of devastating power. His quest leads him to Egypt, where the Nazis are plotting to use the Ark to further Hitlers plans for world domination - aided by Joness deceitful French rival. The first of five big-screen action adventures, starring Harrison Ford as Indy, with Karen Allen, Paul Freeman and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom (1984)
programme.desc: The intrepid archaeologist, with his young sidekick and a nightclub singer in tow, is stranded in India, where he takes on a mission to recover magical sacred stones from the hands of an evil cult engaged in human sacrifice and child slavery. Steven Spielbergs action adventure, starring Harrison Ford, Kate Capshaw, Ke Huy Quan and Amrish Puri

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade (1989)
programme.desc: The intrepid archaeologist sets out to find his estranged father, who has gone missing while searching for the Holy Grail. Once reunited, the duo team up to finish the task and locate the sacred relic before the Nazis get their hands on it. Action adventure sequel directed by Steven Spielberg, the third instalment in the successful franchise. Harrison Ford stars, alongside Sean Connery, Alison Doody, River Phoenix, Julian Glover and Denholm Elliott

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull (2008)
programme.desc: The globe-trotting archaeologist teams up with a rebellious teenager who draws him into a search in the Amazon jungle for a mysterious artefact of untold power. But their quest is hindered by Soviet agents who also want the fabled object for a more sinister purpose. Action adventure sequel, starring Harrison Ford, Cate Blanchett, Shia LaBeouf, Ray Winstone and John Hurt

programme.title: The Mummy (1999)
programme.desc: A soldier of fortune joins an academic and her conniving brother on an expedition to an ancient Egyptian lost city. The explorers accidentally cause the spirit of a vengeful priest with awe-inspiring supernatural powers to rise from his tomb, leading to a desperate battle for survival. Fantasy action adventure, starring Brendan Fraser, Rachel Weisz, John Hannah, Arnold Vosloo and Oded Fehr

programme.title: The Mummy Returns (2001)
programme.desc: Married explorers Rick and Evelyn battle the newly resurrected mummy Imhotep and his ruthless partner, who have captured their son. The undead creature is heading for a confrontation with a legendary ancient warrior - with power over a magical army to be won. Fantasy adventure sequel, starring Brendan Fraser, Rachel Weisz, John Hannah, Arnold Vosloo, Oded Fehr and Patricia Velasquez, with a brief appearance by Dwayne Johnson

programme.title: Bad Boys (1995)
programme.desc: Detectives Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett search for a $100million heroin consignment brazenly stolen by a French drug kingpin from the police evidence room. However, after a mix-up over a phone call from a potential witness, each cop has to assume the others identity - Lowrey becoming the henpecked family man and Burnett the playboy. Michael Bays action thriller, starring Will Smith, Martin Lawrence, Tea Leoni, Tcheky Karyo and Theresa Randle

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor (2008)
programme.desc: Daredevil explorers Rick and Evelyn OConnell are called into action when their son accidentally resurrects the evil Chinese Emperor Han from his ancient tomb. The family now faces a race against time to prevent the merciless leader from awakening his vast terracotta army in a plot to take over the world. Fantasy adventure sequel, starring Brendan Fraser, Maria Bello, Jet Li and Michelle Yeoh.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns (2001)
programme.desc: Married explorers Rick and Evelyn battle the newly resurrected mummy Imhotep and his ruthless partner, who have captured their son. The undead creature is heading for a confrontation with a legendary ancient warrior - with power over a magical army to be won. Fantasy adventure sequel, starring Brendan Fraser, Rachel Weisz, John Hannah, Arnold Vosloo, Oded Fehr and Patricia Velasquez, with a brief appearance by Dwayne Johnson

programme.title: Gremlins (1984)
programme.desc: A teenager is given a strange, cute creature as a Christmas present by his eccentric father and warned to keep it away from water, not to feed it after midnight, or expose it to direct light. However, a chance dousing causes the furball to spawn a horde of murderous little monsters, and their devilish antics bring mayhem to a small town. Comedy horror, with Zach Galligan, Phoebe Cates, Hoyt Axton and Polly Holliday

programme.title: Gremlins 2: The New Batch (1990)
programme.desc: Cute furball Gizmo is reunited with his human friends Billy and Kate, who now work in the New York offices of an eccentric tycoon. However, it is not long before Gizmo has spawned a new generation of murderous carnivores, who quickly overrun the building - and a genetics lab where they produce even more startling mutations. Joe Dantes comedy sequel, starring Zach Galligan, Phoebe Cates, John Glover and Christopher Lee

programme.desc: Detectives Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett search for a $100million heroin consignment brazenly stolen by a French drug kingpin from the police evidence room. However, after a mix-up over a phone call from a potential witness, each cop has to assume the others identity - Lowrey becoming the henpecked family man and Burnett the playboy. Michael Bays action thriller, starring Will Smith, Martin Lawrence, Tea Leoni, Tcheky Karyo and Theresa Randle

programme.title: Bad Boys II (2003)
programme.desc: Two mismatched undercover cops set out to halt an underground gang war and bring down a drug lord attempting to flood the market with a deadly form of Ecstasy. However, a romantic interlude threatens to drive the investigation off course. Comedy thriller sequel, starring Will Smith, Martin Lawrence, Gabrielle Union, Jordi Molla and Peter Stormare

programme.title: Back to the Future (1985)
programme.desc: Teenager Marty McFly travels back to the 1950s in a time machine built by his eccentric inventor friend. The return journey proves tricky enough, but he also accidentally alters the sequence of events that led to his parents falling in love - and has to persuade his future dad to win his mothers heart, or he will never be born. Sci-fi comedy adventure, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Lea Thompson and Crispin Glover

programme.title: Back to the Future Part II (1989)
programme.desc: Time-travelling teenager Marty McFly travels to the 21st century, where he has to save his children from a terrible fate. However, this proves to have unforeseen consequences when the future version of arch enemy Biff sees a chance to rewrite history for his own benefit, leaving Marty stuck in a twisted parallel universe. Sci-fi comedy sequel, starring Michael J Fox and Christopher Lloyd

programme.title: Back to the Future Part III (1990)
programme.desc: Time-travelling teenager Marty McFly is transported back to the days of the Wild West, where he strives to save his eccentric scientist friend Doc Brown from death at the hands of a villainous gunslinger. Final instalment in the sci-fi comedy trilogy, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Mary Steenburgen and Thomas F Wilson

programme.title: Bad Boys II (2003)
programme.desc: Two mismatched undercover cops set out to halt an underground gang war and bring down a drug lord attempting to flood the market with a deadly form of Ecstasy. However, a romantic interlude threatens to drive the investigation off course. Comedy thriller sequel, starring Will Smith, Martin Lawrence, Gabrielle Union, Jordi Molla and Peter Stormare

programme.title: Mad Max (1979)
programme.desc: In the near future, Australian cop Max Rockatansky tires of battling to impose law and order on the roads and turns in his badge - only to be forced out of retirement when his wife and child are murdered at the hands of a motorcycle gang. George Millers action thriller, starring Mel Gibson, Joanne Samuel and Hugh Keays-Byrne

programme.title: Mad Max 2 (1981)
programme.desc: A former cop haunted by his tragic past roams the wasteland of Australia in the aftermath of a nuclear war. He arrives at a besieged settlement and grudgingly helps protect the residents from a horde of marauding bikers who want to get hold of their valuable supply of petrol. Futuristic adventure sequel, starring Mel Gibson, Bruce Spence, Vernon Wells, Emil Minty and Kjell Nilsson

programme.desc: Unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins is pulled out of his comfortable life when Gandalf the wizard volunteers him for a dangerous quest. He joins a party of dwarves who are on a mission to reclaim their lost homeland, which has been taken over by a dragon. When the group journeys into the Misty Mountains, Bilbo becomes separated from the dwarves and falls into a cave, where he finds himself confronted by Gollum and forced to play a riddle game. It is set in Middle-earth 60 years before the events of The Lord of the Rings and is the first part of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage, James Nesbitt, Ken Stott, Cate Blanchett, Ian Holm and Christopher Lee

programme.title: De Valera San Fhásach
programme.desc: Part two of two. Documentary about American-born Irish statesman and political leader Éamon de Valera, a leader in the 1916 Easter Rising. In perhaps, the greatest political U-turn in modern Irish history, De Valera secured a place for Fianna Fáil in the annals of history by accepting the Oath of Allegiance. The women who supported him found themselves in an Ireland, far removed from the vision of equality as laid out in the 1916 proclamation

programme.title: All and Eva
programme.desc: For 40 years, Eva has remained steadfast in her disbelief in love. Instead, she believes that happiness lies in her love for herself and her friends, a philosophy that has guided her well in her meticulously planned life. After deciding to get pregnant she goes to Copenhagen to select a sperm donor. She later has doubts about her choice, so seeks him out, without revealing why. Drama, starring Tuva Novotny, Joachim Fjelstrup and Sanna Sundqvist. In Swedish and Danish

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.desc: Saucy British comedy about three men caught up in compromising situations during their normal daily lives. Comedy, starring Dennis Waterman and Vanda Hudson.

programme.title: Futtocks End (1970)
programme.desc: A general invites a motley group of guests to stay at his country estate - and chaos ensues. Silent comedy. starring Ronnie Barker, Michael Hordern and Roger Livesey

programme.title: Battle of Britain: Empty Skies
programme.desc: A unique insight into what it was really like to be there. Interviews with the pilots, cut with archive footage paint the picture of one of historys greatest ever air battles

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Flo Headlam meet Danni and Dawn, a couple from Biggleswade who want a whimsical wonderland in their back garden for their five-year-old twins. With a £5,000 budget, designers Charlie and Flo are ready to let their creative juices flow

programme.title: Love Your Home and Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and his team bring the outside indoors for an inspirational family in Swindon. Wheelchair users Nina and Steve Parry look after Ninas two children, but struggle with a poorly laid-out living space that offers no direct connection to their neglected back garden. Architects George Bradley and Ewald Van Der Straeten, along with building expert Kunle Barker, handle the challenges inside, bringing lots of clever ideas and some cool contemporary flare to the bungalow

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Stories
programme.desc: Amid Belfasts buzzy food scene, Rick tucks into Filipino-style Sunday lunch. On Northern Irelands Atlantic coast, he meets an award-winning chef, with a no waste approach, who turns fish offal and under-used species such as dog fish into stunning dishes. Rick also makes his first Filipino dish, and, after witnessing the dry-ageing of some special Irish beef, cooks beef and Guinness pie

programme.title: Robson Greens Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Former Britains Got Talent winner Lee Ridley, aka Lost Voice Guy, is Robsons guest on a trip to Weardale and Co Durham to explore ways of spending time in the outdoors. Lee takes Robson to a favourite spot he used to walk as a child near his Consett home, before the pair take to the water at Derwent Reservoir as they investigate the stress-relieving benefits of sailing

programme.title: My Greek Kitchen
programme.desc: Tonia Buxton travels to Rhodes, where she cooks a feast of Afelia - pork braised in red wine - and discovers the old towns traditional trades and crafts

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Flo Headlam meet Danni and Dawn, a couple from Biggleswade who want a whimsical wonderland in their back garden for their five-year-old twins. With a £5,000 budget, designers Charlie and Flo are ready to let their creative juices flow

programme.desc: A future Government has eradicated all deafness, and a time traveller is sent to the present to find and stop

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Lee Burkhill are in Cheltenham to create a contemporary exotic garden for Brandon, inspired by his journeys through the jungles of Asia and South America

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Chris Hull and Charlie Dimmock have £5,000 to transform Anooshis bland boring land into a showstopper garden that could win the top prize at the Chelsea Flower Show. She wants colour, plants and absolutely no statues

programme.title: Queer Lives Today
programme.desc: Anna Mouzouris touching documentary following the aquatic escapades of two queer mermaids as they find belonging through mermaid races and mermaid conventions

programme.title: How to Have a Better Orgasm
programme.desc: Seven women give intimate interviews about their diverse experience of orgasms, sharing a variety of stories and techniques covering a range of ages. Personal accounts reveal that, across the board, theres a turning point in understanding orgasms and learning how to have a better one. For Helen, it was her first experience of lesbian sex, which made her realise how important communication is to sex, while Sam attributes it to meeting her husband, because it was the first time someone cared about her pleasure

programme.title: Can You Keep it Up for a Week? (1974)
programme.desc: A workshy mans fiancee challenges him to hold down a steady job - a situation that puts him squarely in the path of temptation. Comedy, starring Richard OSullivan, Jeremy Bulloch, Neil Hallett and Jill Damas

programme.title: Real Thick Glasses
programme.desc: Soloman Watkins quirky take as he interviews Michael, owner of the worlds most unique collection of Really Thick Glasses. Funded and supported by Together TV and Cat Flap Media.

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: Retired customs officer Keith has been living and working in New Zealand for 25 years. Now, he wants to return to the UK for part of the year and go touring the waterways of the UK with his wife Pam. Hes commissioning a brand-spanking-new semi-cruiser narrowboat complete with all the latest gadgets. However, Keith has never owned a boat before, let alone skippered or crewed a narrowboat, so he needs to learn very quickly

programme.title: Highclere: The Real Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Documentary following life at Highclere Castle, best known to Downton Abbey fans as the setting for the popular period drama, following Lord and Lady Carnarvon and their loyal staff as they strive to make this year the most profitable to date, with a busy calendar of events both home and away. Lady Carnarvon becomes an unexpected tour guide for some Americans whove turned up expecting a private tour of the famous castle. Head butler Luis mans the drinks and ice-cream kiosk on one of the hottest days of spring, while head of visitor reception Paul prepares to display a precious family heirloom - a vintage 1936 Rolls-Royce

programme.title: Flipping Profit
programme.desc: Antiques expert Mark Stacey, wheeler-dealer Tony Wong and upcycler Zoe Pocock head to Exeter to find some bargains they can turn into profit for Children in Need. The three experts try to outdo each other by scouring the citys antiques shops, scrap yards and flea markets in search of any items they can convert to cash. When the day is done and the time is up, they then get just three weeks to turn their goodies into gold

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Famous thriller author Frank OToole is found stabbed through the heart after taking an early morning swim in the ocean. Suspicion soon falls on the victims wife Valerie, but with eyewitnesses confirming he was swimming alone, how could anyone have got from the house to the sea without being detected? Away from the investigation, Dwayne concentrates on finding a date for a voodoo love festival. Whodunit, guest starring Simon Callow, Imogen Stubbs, and Sian Gibson of Car Share fame

programme.desc: The detective investigates when a statue of the Virgin Mary anonymously donated to his church begins weeping tears of blood, which turns out to be human

programme.title: Beyond Paradise
programme.desc: Festive instalment of the detective drama. DI Humphrey Goodman investigates a bizarre set of break-ins where items are left behind rather than taken - and Santa is the number one suspect. The investigation leads to a bittersweet discovery that makes Humphrey and his team reconsider the true meaning of Christmas. Kelby babysits a cheeky young shoplifter, and , Esthers daughter Zoe gets some sage advice from Anne

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Famous thriller author Frank OToole is found stabbed through the heart after taking an early morning swim in the ocean. Suspicion soon falls on the victims wife Valerie, but with eyewitnesses confirming he was swimming alone, how could anyone have got from the house to the sea without being detected? Away from the investigation, Dwayne concentrates on finding a date for a voodoo love festival. Whodunit, guest starring Simon Callow, Imogen Stubbs, and Sian Gibson of Car Share fame

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Mooney and the team become embroiled in the mysterious world of faith healing when a blind woman dies while being treated by renowned healer Steadman King. When it turns out the victim was poisoned, all eyes turn to Steadman and his cup of holy water. But how could the prime suspect have carried out the deed in front of an audience without anyone noticing? Meanwhile, JP is put through his paces when Pico the police dog joins the team on a week-long trial, and Florence tries to recreate some of Jacks home comforts

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The leader of a spiritual retreat is found strangled en route to the contemplation garden, giving Jack plenty to think about as he tries to figure out which member of the group was responsible. The problem is, they were all meditating at the time of the murder, and are able to provide one another with alibis, so how could any of them be the killer? To add to the DIs problems, he is struggling to come up with a speech to honour Commissioner Patterson at an award ceremony. Caribbean whodunit, starring Ardal OHanlon

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Another mystery for Ardal OHanlon as Irish detective Jack Mooney working on the Caribbean island of Saint Marie, where the sun shines all day and it seems half the residents are killers-in-waiting. And so it appears this week as someone from JPs past is caught red-handed at a murder scene, raking up old memories for the young officer. But can the DI unravel the complex mystery to get at the truth? Tobi Bakare and Danny John-Jules co-star, with guest appearances from Ralph Brown and Adjoa Andoh

programme.title: Beyond Paradise
programme.desc: Festive instalment of the detective drama. DI Humphrey Goodman investigates a bizarre set of break-ins where items are left behind rather than taken - and Santa is the number one suspect. The investigation leads to a bittersweet discovery that makes Humphrey and his team reconsider the true meaning of Christmas. Kelby babysits a cheeky young shoplifter, and , Esthers daughter Zoe gets some sage advice from Anne

programme.title: Miss Scarlet and the Duke
programme.desc: The divorce of a high society couple causes scandal when their settlement becomes public. Their prize racehorse goes missing - and each party blames the other

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Reporter Louise Cherry investigates a suspicious death of a man at a meat processing plant by going undercover as a sausage maker

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A feature-length special to conclude the anniversary celebrations, which stretches from a grey, damp and drizzly London all the way to the sparkling beauty of idyllic Saint Marie. A wealthy shipping magnate is found dead at a Christmas party. Things get stranger when a man in London receives a mysterious Christmas card connected to the victims death. Danny John-Jules makes a return as charismatic Officer Dwayne Myers, with special guests Mathew Baynton, Juliet Stevenson, Stanley Townsend, Jocelyn Jee Esien, Anthony Calf, Tessa Bonham Jones, Elizabeth Tan, Tariq Jordan and Sara Cox joining the regular cast

programme.title: NCIS: Sydney
programme.desc: When a man in a concealed US Navy jacket drops dead from a cocaine overdose on a bus in Bondi, the investigation pulls Evie back into her past as an undercover narcotics cop

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest walks in on a man standing over the body of his dead wife, while Mrs McCarthy strikes it lucky at the church bingo with the help of a fortune teller her sister has befriended. Guest starring Niamh Cusack

programme.title: The Boy That Never Was
programme.desc: Throwing Robin off the trail, Harry convinces her that he now knows she was right, seeing Dillon was all in his head. Behind her back, Harry uses the footage he found in the bin as a starting point and is now able to track down the woman and her son to their hire car

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The team investigates when an entrepreneur is found dead in a ravine, but things take a turn when his familys digital marketing guru suddenly disappears. Nevilles mum Melanie arrives on the island and teams up with Catherine to take the Saint Marie dating scene by storm and the Commissioners big Christmas lights switch-on comes to an awkward stop. Caribbean-set detective drama, starring Ralf Little, Don Warrington, Doon Mackichan and Patsy Kensit

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A man confesses to murdering his boss, despite being unable to remember what happened. Convinced that things are not as simple as they seem, Neville determines to uncover the truth and unmask the real killer. Detective drama, starring Ralf Little

But can the DI unravel the complex mystery to get at the truth? Tobi Bakare and Danny John-Jules co-star, with guest appearances from Ralph Brown and Adjoa Andoh

programme.title: Beyond Paradise
programme.desc: Festive instalment of the detective drama. DI Humphrey Goodman investigates a bizarre set of break-ins where items are left behind rather than taken - and Santa is the number one suspect. The investigation leads to a bittersweet discovery that makes Humphrey and his team reconsider the true meaning of Christmas. Kelby babysits a cheeky young shoplifter, and , Esthers daughter Zoe gets some sage advice from Anne

programme.title: Miss Scarlet and the Duke
programme.desc: The divorce of a high society couple causes scandal when their settlement becomes public. Their prize racehorse goes missing - and each party blames the other

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Reporter Louise Cherry investigates a suspicious death of a man at a meat processing plant by going undercover as a sausage maker

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A feature-length special to conclude the anniversary celebrations, which stretches from a grey, damp and drizzly London all the way to the sparkling beauty of idyllic Saint Marie. A wealthy shipping magnate is found dead at a Christmas party. Things get stranger when a man in London receives a mysterious Christmas card connected to the victims death. Danny John-Jules makes a return as charismatic Officer Dwayne Myers, with special guests Mathew Baynton, Juliet Stevenson, Stanley Townsend, Jocelyn Jee Esien, Anthony Calf, Tessa Bonham Jones, Elizabeth Tan, Tariq Jordan and Sara Cox joining the regular cast

programme.title: NCIS: Sydney
programme.desc: When a man in a concealed US Navy jacket drops dead from a cocaine overdose on a bus in Bondi, the investigation pulls Evie back into her past as an undercover narcotics cop

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries

programme.desc: Richard Ayoade and comedian Phill Jupitus go on a day out, testing a range of gadgets and technology, from the worlds tiniest caravan to 360-degree cameras, 300 litre rucksacks and a pair of trousers that transform into a picnic table. programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May compare the Mercedes SLS, the Porsche 911 GT3 RS and the Ferrari 458 Italia, as they race against each other in an epic road trip up Americas east coast

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May set out to boost the British economy by embarking on a trade mission to India. Equipped with three old British cars and a range of uniquely British products, they set off on an epic road trip across one of the worlds most fascinating and challenging countries, devotedly promoting Britain - with distinctly mixed results

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May travel to America for an interstate road trip, completing various challenges along the way. Starting in Miami, they each buy a car for less than $1,000 and drive to New Orleans, where they set out to give their vehicles away to people who suffered in Hurricane Katrina

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Special in which Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May take three used, V8-engined sports cars on a gruelling road trip covering 1,600 miles through Patagonia to the worlds southernmost city. Having encountered stunning landscapes, mechanical mishaps and dreadful roads on their journey through Argentina, the trios adventure is brought to a dramatic climax by a terrifying turn of events

programme.title: Guy Martin: Proper Jobs
programme.desc: Documentary series in which Guy Martin gets stuck into doing some of the most demanding and often dangerous jobs in the UK. From working as a deckhand on a fishing trawler to taking the opportunity to work as a search and rescue dog handler in the Highlands of Scotland, the jobs that Guy undertakes require skill, physical effort and courage.

programme.title: Guy Martin: Proper Jobs
programme.desc: The presenter gets to grips with nature as a wildlife warden on the remote Calf of Man island while trying his hand at birdwatching, rat catching, and cleaning up a beach for seals

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon reaches the United States, travelling down the Rocky Mountains from Montana to Colorado. In the wide-open prairies of Montana, the cowboy way of life is under threat from a long-term decline in the rural economy, but Simon meets a former Silicon Valley executive who has envisaged a new future for the land. In a country with the highest incarceration rate in the world, Simons final destination on this leg is a Colorado town that depends almost entirely on 11 prisons. Simon witnesses how inmates are put to work for the state, and how virtual reality is being used to prepare prisoners for life on the outside

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels the length of California. He climbs to the top of one of the worlds tallest trees, and meets the fire crews tasked with tackling the ever-present danger of wildfires, a growing threat given the states changing climate and chronic shortage of water. He also meets street doctors providing much-needed medical support to people living in extreme poverty and visits a city on the desert for Americans who have dropped out of the rat race entirely

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: The return of the documentary series that follows the investigations of specialist units within UK police forces created to crack the toughest of cases, from cyber heists, romance fraud and people trafficking to drug rings and murder. With access to some of Britain?s most talented detectives, the series explores the investigations, methods and evidence that has put some of the UK?s most dangerous criminals behind bars. Each episode features evidential police footage as they take on criminals and hunt for clues to solve the cases. The series offers a first-hand experience of the work of the elite units on the front line while witnessing their bravery, skill and compassion amid tragedy and loss. The series also discovers how detectives operate in the interview room, how forensics bring a case into focus, and how expert CCTV and digital analysis create timelines and evidence to catch a criminal, and the impact these crimes have on the communities they serve. The suspicious demise of a woman at the cult-like Wiltshire retreat of a self-proclaimed healer sparks a global investigation and a link to a death in Australia

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: A routine visit by the RSPCA to a house in Chigwell in Essex uncovers an underground UK dog-fighting gang operating on a global scale

programme.desc: Moira tries to push Alexis into the dating scene, Johnny is driven crazy by a new colleague and Patrick and Stevie confront David about his inflexibility

programme.desc: Richard Ayoade asks farmer and foodie Jimmy Doherty to join him for a visit to the supermarket to trial gadgets designed to ease grocery shopping, including a robotic assistant, a fruit ripeness reader and a food ethics scanner. He then turns his attention to clothes shopping and heads to a department store, with actress Alison Steadman in tow, to test a 3D virtual mirror and a check out a mannequin with expanding bust and hips

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers continue their culinary journey through time by celebrating Britains numerous food festivals. The duo reveal the fascinating stories behind the events and sample some of the dishes on offer

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The boys embark on a mission of Biblical proportions: to find the source of the Nile using three ageing motors to negotiate traffic, mudslides, and crocodile-infested waters

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: First episode of the comedy about the romance between a couple with differing cultures and backgrounds. Gavin and Stacey have flirted for months on the phone at work but have never met up - until she travels from Wales to London to see him. Mathew Horne and Joanna Page star alongside Rob Brydon, Alison Steadman, Ruth Jones and James Corden

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: The couple have their first lovers tiff and Gavin is so beside himself with worry he drives all the way to Barry Island to resolve things. Stacey finally agrees to return to Billericay with her beau, prompting his proud mum Pamela to set about cleaning the house from top to bottom. Mathew Horne and Joanna Page star

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: The couple announce their engagement, prompting the Shipmans to throw a party in Billericay. Even Bryns decision to use his sat-nav for the journey fails to dampen their spirits, and everything goes swimmingly until the conversation turns to money - and the sweethearts drop a bombshell. Mathew Horne and Joanna Page star

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: The Shipmans drive to Wales for the wedding fayre, and after a momentous trip to the church for the reading of the banns, Nessa tells Stacey her big secret. Comedy, starring Mathew Horne and Joanna Page

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: The bride-to-be goes on a hen party, while Gavin embarks on two stag nights, the second of which reveals shocking secrets about his fiancee that could jeopardise the wedding. Elsewhere, the early return of Staceys brother Jason horrifies Uncle Bryn. Comedy, starring Mathew Horne and Joanna Page

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: The day of the wedding arrives and Bryn is still behaving oddly around Staceys brother. Nessa debates whether to share her big secret and Smithy resolves to give a superb best mans speech - but finds himself overcome with emotion under the spotlight. Mathew Horne and Joanna Page star

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer return to Scotland for their latest fishing trip. Having failed to catch a salmon in the River Tay, they hope to have more luck on the Tweed. They begin their journey at the isolated Bemersyde Estate before moving on to the Bridge Pool at Kelso, one of the most famous salmon fishing spots in Scotland. They also try their hand at boat fishing and receive some mystical predictions from a familiar face

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer are joined by singer and conservationist Feargal Sharkey for a trip to the River Lea in Hertfordshire, where Paul used to fish for perch with his friends when he was a teenager. Bob reads up on the wise words of 17th-century angler Izaak Walton and prepares a riverside picnic that brings back fond memories and leads to a reflection on the differences between teenage life in their 1970s youth and the present. Setting up home in a narrowbooat, he also prepares a dish Pauls mother used to make - corned beef and potato pie

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer head to Norfolk, where they attempt to ensnare a large pike - a fish that has eluded them on their trips so far. As they arrive and get their gear together, Bob introduces Paul to the surprisingly varied contents of his car boot, much to Pauls amusement. They gather their equipment and find a decent spot that should give them plenty of chances to catch and make camp for the day. They end their trip with a visit to a local pub, where Bob reveals a hidden trick

programme.title: Rick Steins Road to Mexico
programme.desc: The chef retraces a road trip he took in 1968 down the Pacific Coast Highway to the Mexican border and beyond. He begins in San Francisco, the home of sourdough and where Americas love affair with seasonal cooking took hold through restaurants like Chez Panisse, run by Alice Waters, who Rick is keen to meet. The chef also reflects on the time he had his first taste of Mexican food

programme.title: Rick Steins Road to Mexico
programme.desc: The chef continues down the Californian coastline immortalised by John Steinbeck, a region of citrus groves and vineyards. On the edge of Los Angeles, Rick discovers Olvera Street, where the Hispanic origins of the city took root. Then heading south to San Diego, he meets 79-year-old Peter Halmay, the oldest sea-urchin diver in town, and is served the best fish chilli he has ever had by a local fishmonger

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?

Simon witnesses how inmates are put to work for the state, and how virtual reality is being used to prepare prisoners for life on the outside

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels the length of California. He climbs to the top of one of the worlds tallest trees, and meets the fire crews tasked with tackling the ever-present danger of wildfires, a growing threat given the states changing climate and chronic shortage of water. He also meets street doctors providing much-needed medical support to people living in extreme poverty and visits a city on the desert for Americans who have dropped out of the rat race entirely

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: The return of the documentary series that follows the investigations of specialist units within UK police forces created to crack the toughest of cases, from cyber heists, romance fraud and people trafficking to drug rings and murder. With access to some of Britain?s most talented detectives, the series explores the investigations, methods and evidence that has put some of the UK?s most dangerous criminals behind bars. Each episode features evidential police footage as they take on criminals and hunt for clues to solve the cases. The series offers a first-hand experience of the work of the elite units on the front line while witnessing their bravery, skill and compassion amid tragedy and loss. The series also discovers how detectives operate in the interview room, how forensics bring a case into focus, and how expert CCTV and digital analysis create timelines and evidence to catch a criminal, and the impact these crimes have on the communities they serve. The suspicious demise of a woman at the cult-like Wiltshire retreat of a self-proclaimed healer sparks a global investigation and a link to a death in Australia

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: A routine visit by the RSPCA to a house in Chigwell in Essex uncovers an underground UK dog-fighting gang operating on a global scale

Mathew Horne and Joanna Page star alongside Rob Brydon, Alison Steadman, Ruth Jones and James Corden

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: The couple have their first lovers tiff and Gavin is so beside himself with worry he drives all the way to Barry Island to resolve things. Stacey finally agrees to return to Billericay with her beau, prompting his proud mum Pamela to set about cleaning the house from top to bottom. Mathew Horne and Joanna Page star

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: The couple announce their engagement, prompting the Shipmans to throw a party in Billericay. Even Bryns decision to use his sat-nav for the journey fails to dampen their spirits, and everything goes swimmingly until the conversation turns to money - and the sweethearts drop a bombshell. Mathew Horne and Joanna Page star

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: The Shipmans drive to Wales for the wedding fayre, and after a momentous trip to the church for the reading of the banns, Nessa tells Stacey her big secret. Comedy, starring Mathew Horne and Joanna Page

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: The bride-to-be goes on a hen party, while Gavin embarks on two stag nights, the second of which reveals shocking secrets about his fiancee that could jeopardise the wedding. programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: The day of the wedding arrives and Bryn is still behaving oddly around Staceys brother. Nessa debates whether to share her big secret and Smithy resolves to give a superb best mans speech - but finds himself overcome with emotion under the spotlight. Mathew Horne and Joanna Page star

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer return to Scotland for their latest fishing trip. Having failed to catch a salmon in the River Tay, they hope to have more luck on the Tweed. They begin their journey at the isolated Bemersyde Estate before moving on to the Bridge Pool at Kelso, one of the most famous salmon fishing spots in Scotland. They also try their hand at boat fishing and receive some mystical predictions from a familiar face

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer are joined by singer and conservationist Feargal Sharkey for a trip to the River Lea in Hertfordshire, where Paul used to fish for perch with his friends when he was a teenager. Bob reads up on the wise words of 17th-century angler Izaak Walton and prepares a riverside picnic that brings back fond memories and leads to a reflection on the differences between teenage life in their 1970s youth and the present. Setting up home in a narrowbooat, he also prepares a dish Pauls mother used to make - corned beef and potato pie

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer head to Norfolk, where they attempt to ensnare a large pike - a fish that has eluded them on their trips so far. As they arrive and get their gear together, Bob introduces Paul to the surprisingly varied contents of his car boot, much to Pauls amusement. They gather their equipment and find a decent spot that should give them plenty of chances to catch and make camp for the day. They end their trip with a visit to a local pub, where Bob reveals a hidden trick

programme.title: Rick Steins Road to Mexico
programme.desc: The chef retraces a road trip he took in 1968 down the Pacific Coast Highway to the Mexican border and beyond. He begins in San Francisco, the home of sourdough and where Americas love affair with seasonal cooking took hold through restaurants like Chez Panisse, run by Alice Waters, who Rick is keen to meet. The chef also reflects on the time he had his first taste of Mexican food

programme.title: Rick Steins Road to Mexico
programme.desc: The chef continues down the Californian coastline immortalised by John Steinbeck, a region of citrus groves and vineyards. On the edge of Los Angeles, Rick discovers Olvera Street, where the Hispanic origins of the city took root. Then heading south to San Diego, he meets 79-year-old Peter Halmay, the oldest sea-urchin diver in town, and is served the best fish chilli he has ever had by a local fishmonger

programme.desc: Drama inspired by the true story of the Dutch couple who risked their lives to hide Anne Frank and her family, and other persecuted Jews, during the Second World War. Miep Gies (Bel Powley) works as a secretary to Otto Frank (Liev Schreiber) in Amsterdam as the city comes under Nazi occupation. Otto fears for the safety of his loved ones and decides to hide in the secret annexe of his business premises along with members of the van Pels and Pfeffer families. Miep, her husband Jan (Joe Cole) and other brave souls agree to watch over the fugitives and keep them safe from the Nazis for the next two years

programme.desc: Sister Reginalds incorrigible brother Alfie Lynch, a habitual thief, turns up at the nunnery seeking help. He is put up at Mrs Clamss guest house. At an art exhibition in the local gallery, egocentric artist Gerry Ardwell features himself as the main exhibit. The next morning, Ardwell is found dead, bludgeoned by a brass statue, while a valuable painting has been stolen. Alfie Lynch is missing and DI Gillespies main suspect. programme.title: James Mays Cars of the People
programme.desc: The presenter examines how the car industry in Germany and Japan blossomed following the Second World War, becoming manufacturing giants that far outstripped the Allied nations that had defeated them. He test drives some of the vehicles Germany and Japan produced during the post-war period, as well as an assortment of other classic cars, including E-Types and Mustangs. He also reveals the sad tale of the Austin Allegro, a vehicle that had a devastating impact on the British car industry

programme.title: James Mays Cars of the People
programme.desc: James charts the history of 4x4 vehicles from the jeeps of the Second World war onwards, revealing how they rose in popularity in everyday use and in rallies. He explores the rivalry between Land Rover and Land Cruiser, and puts some classic vehicles through their paces by driving up Mount Fuji and through the Mojave desert

programme.title: James Mays Cars of the People
programme.desc: James looks at some of the advances in motoring that never caught on, revealing how the petrol engine came to dominate in the 20th century, while concepts for jet engines and steam power fell by the wayside. programme.title: James Mays Cars of the People
programme.desc: James charts the history of 4x4 vehicles from the jeeps of the Second World war onwards, revealing how they rose in popularity in everyday use and in rallies. He explores the rivalry between Land Rover and Land Cruiser, and puts some classic vehicles through their paces by driving up Mount Fuji and through the Mojave desert

programme.title: James Mays Cars of the People
programme.desc: James looks at some of the advances in motoring that never caught on, revealing how the petrol engine came to dominate in the 20th century, while concepts for jet engines and steam power fell by the wayside. He also drives an amphibious car and an electric scooter, and takes a ride in the worlds fastest driverless car

programme.title: James Mays Cars of the People
programme.desc: The presenter examines how the car industry in Germany and Japan blossomed following the Second World War, becoming manufacturing giants that far outstripped the Allied nations that had defeated them. He test drives some of the vehicles Germany and Japan produced during the post-war period, as well as an assortment of other classic cars, including E-Types and Mustangs. He also reveals the sad tale of the Austin Allegro, a vehicle that had a devastating impact on the British car industry

programme.title: James Mays Cars of the People
programme.desc: James charts the history of 4x4 vehicles from the jeeps of the Second World war onwards, revealing how they rose in popularity in everyday use and in rallies. He explores the rivalry between Land Rover and Land Cruiser, and puts some classic vehicles through their paces by driving up Mount Fuji and through the Mojave desert

programme.title: The Life of Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough presents an insight into the most successful animals on the planet. Observing an Arctic fox stalk prey in its -20C environment, he reveals warm-bloodedness as one of the key factors in the mammals global domination. He also studies marsupials in Australia and Central America, offering a unique view inside a platypuss breeding burrow

programme.title: The Life of Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough offers an insight into insect-eating animals, including shrews that dive under water, moles that can swim in the Namib Desert, and New Zealand bats that hunt in packs on the ground, walking on their wrists and foraging. Plus, how hedgehogs and armadillos liven up their diet with fruit and birds eggs, while pangolins and giant anteaters survive entirely on a diet of insects

programme.title: The Life of Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough uses advanced surveillance technology to observe the feeding habits of herbivores, including elephants forced to undertake epic migrations to ensure a steady diet of the plants they need to survive. He also considers the habits of the sloth, which takes a month to digest each meal, and reveals scientific research suggesting that grazing wildebeest do not follow the rains as originally thought, but detect trails of phosphorus in the grass

programme.title: The Life of Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines the world of rodents, whose constantly growing incisor teeth are used to chisel through any obstacle and range from squirrels and the English harvest mouse to the large South American capybara. He looks at examples of their dental prowess, showing how agoutis in Panama break open rock-hard nutshells and the skills employed by beavers in Wyoming as they fell massive trees to build dams rivalling feats of human engineering

programme.title: The Life of Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough presents an insight into the most successful animals on the planet. Observing an Arctic fox stalk prey in its -20C environment, he reveals warm-bloodedness as one of the key factors in the mammals global domination. programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team reveals why the Isle of Harris is the perfect location for road-testing cabriolets, and find out if it is possible to parachute into a moving car travelling at 50mph. Richard Hammond unveils the blueprint for the perfect roadster and Ranulph Fiennes is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson gets a good soaking when he takes BMWs off-roader, the X3 out for a spin, and Richard Hammond discovers how the Corvette C6 is a break with tradition. Plus, James May discovers the biggest item he can get into the back of a Volvo V50. Comedian Patrick Kielty is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and the gang are back with another high-octane instalment of the popular motoring series. The Porsche 911 is put through its paces on the racetrack and the British Jaguar S type is pitted against its rivals, the American Chrysler 300C and the Australian Vauxhall Monaro VXR. Plus, a chance to help preserve an element of motoring history in Restoration. Comedian Bill Bailey is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.desc: The challenge of DIY proves too much for Terry when June decides to keep up with the Joneses. Comedy, starring Terry Scott and June Whitfield

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry embarks on a health kick - until he overhears a conversation during his annual medical examination

programme.title: Bottom
programme.desc: The boys join Mrs Linekers Love Bureau hoping to find their perfect love matches. Richies video tells the potential suitors that he is, in fact, a duke and this secures him a date with a countess from Moldavia. Undeterred, he invites her to his place and arranges for Eddie to pretend to be his butler for the evening. Chaotic comedy, written by and starring Adrian Edmondson and Rik Mayall

programme.title: Bottom
programme.desc: Richie and Eddies TV is repossessed, giving them ample opportunity to amuse themselves with a series of violent tit-for-tat assaults thinly disguised as games. Rik Mayall and Adrian Edmondson star

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Agnes is upset that Trevor has decided to work for a mission project in Africa, and resolves to give him an unforgettable send-off to remind him of the loving family he has in Ireland. Cathys family counselling session descends into chaos, Buster and Dermot land themselves in trouble because of a circus lion, and neighbour Winnie is delighted that her husbands libido has returned. Comedy, starring Brendan OCarroll

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: A secretive phone call from a solicitor to Mrs Brown leaves her children suspecting one of them may be adopted, while Father Quinn returns from rehab and asks Agnes to help out at his annual garden party - although as she proceeds to drive him crazy with a smartphone, his recovery may be short-lived. Meanwhile, Cathy receives a blast from the past, Rory and Dino have a bust-up, and Mark and Betty deliver bad news - they are leaving for Australia right away. Domestic comedy, starring Brendan OCarroll

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Geraldine tries to make the supreme sacrifice by giving up chocolate for Lent. Mrs Cropleys also being good, vowing to steer clear of lard and fishpaste pancakes, and even Jim has a bash at self-denial. Meanwhile, Alices unwavering belief in the Dibley Bunny is ridiculed. Easter special from 1996

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Geraldines hopes of romance are fuelled by a visit from Davids handsome brother, while the Hortons return from honeymoon with a souvenir they had not bargained for - Alice is pregnant. The only problem is, she doesnt know it yet. Clerical comedy, starring Dawn French and Emma Chambers. From Christmas Eve 1999

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Alice suggests an unconventional nativity play starring herself and Hugo as Mary and Joseph, and adds an extra touch of authenticity by going into labour mid-performance. The coincidence is so striking that she asks Geraldine whether she has given birth to the Son of God - even though her baby is a girl. Festive episode from 1999, starring Dawn French and Emma Chambers

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Alice and Hugos baby is christened. The godparents are chosen, the Bishop of Mulberry officiates, and David asks Geraldine to marry him. She consents to his proposal - until sense prevails. Comedy, guest starring Sean Bean, with Dawn French, Gary Waldhorn, James Fleet and Emma Chambers

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: A summer water shortage presents problems for the locals, especially Alice, whose lack of clean clothes forces her to wear a Wonder Woman outfit instead. The parched residents soon see events turned on their head as the water company offers to resolve the problem by flooding the village to create a reservoir

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Preparations for Nessa and Daves wedding are in full swing, Stacey has life-changing news for Gavin, and Bryn and Jason put their big secret to bed once and for all. Mathew Horne, Joanna Page, James Corden, Ruth Jones and Rob Brydon star

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Nessa goes into labour a month early in Barry, and the newlyweds must forget their differences to track down Smithy in time for the birth of his child. Meanwhile, Stacey returns to Essex to salvage her marriage

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy announces that she plans to marry Pavlov, a mechanic from the old Eastern bloc who needs her help to stay in the country and avoid returning to his tragic life back home. However, Lee is the only one who seems to object to the arrangement. Comedy, starring Lee Mack, Sally Bretton, Tim Vine and Timothy West

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: When Lucy needs help writing an important speech she is due to give at a recruitment conference, Lee hopes to impress her by offering his services. However, Tim also thinks he could do a good job and it turns into a fierce competition to discover who can come up with the wittiest lines. Comedy, starring Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Tim Vine

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Agnes tries to make friends with Dermots mother-in-law Hillary ahead of the babys birth, and suggests they go out to dinner together. However, the evening comes to an abrupt end for the two feuding matriarchs when expectant mum Maria goes into labour, and the Browns are forced to rush her to hospital. Comedy, written by and starring Brendan OCarroll

programme.title: Bottom: Exposed
programme.desc: Adrian Edmondson gives a first-hand account of making the hit comedy with the late, great Rik Mayall, alongside contributions from a host of the shows cast, crew and famous fans.

programme.desc: Comedy sketches with the multi-faceted funnyman and his partners in mirth Paul Whitehouse and Kathy Burke. Featuring characters Wayne and Waynetta Slob, Tim Nice-But-Dim, The Scousers and DJs Smashie and Nicey
